data.html:
<html lang="en"><head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Treasury System - Crypto Platform</title>
    <style>
        
        body {
  overflow-x: hidden;
}
        body {
            margin: 0;
            background: #000000;
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
            color: #ffffff;
            min-height: 150vh;
            padding: 20px;
        }
        canvas {
            display: block;
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            z-index: 1;
        }
        .overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 750px;
            height: 750px;
            background: #000000;
            z-index: 2;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
            border: 2px solid;
            border-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, #96ffc8, #00ff00) 1;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
           
            margin-top: 1540px;
        
        }
        .overlay2 {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 750px;
            height: 750px;
            background: #000000;
            z-index: 2;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            text-align: center;
            border: 2px solid;
            border-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, #96ffc8, #00ff00) 1;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            padding: 30px;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            margin-left: -385px; /* Offset to the left */
        }

        .overlay3 {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 750px;
            height: 750px;
            background: #000000;
            z-index: 2;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
            border: 2px solid;
            border-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, #96ffc8, #00ff00) 1;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            margin-top: 770px; /* Offset to below the other overlays */
            margin-left: -385px; /* Offset to the left */
        }

        .overlay4 {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 750px;
            height: 750px;
            background: #000000;
            z-index: 2;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
            border: 2px solid;
            border-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, #96ffc8, #00ff00) 1;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            margin-top: 770px; /* Offset to above the other overlays */
            margin-left: 385px; /* Offset to the right */
        }
        .overlay5 {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 750px;
            height: 750px;
            background: #000000;
            z-index: 2;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            text-align: center;
            border: 2px solid;
            border-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, #96ffc8, #00ff00) 1;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            padding: 30px;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            margin-left: 385px; /* Offset to the right */
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }
        
        h1 {
            font-size: 32px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px #ffffff;
        }
        .underline {
            width: 109%;
            height: 3px;
            background: #ffffff;
            margin-bottom: 0;
        }
        .tab-container {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            width: 109%;
            margin: 12px 0;
        }
        .tab {
            flex: 1;
            height: 50px;
            margin: 0;
            background: transparent;
            border: 2px solid #ffffff;
            border-right: none;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        .tab:last-child {
            border-right: 2px solid #ffffff;
        }
        .tab:hover {
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #000000;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px #ffffff;
        }
        .tab.active {
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #000000;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px #ffffff;
        }
        
        /* Mobile dropdown styles for System Tokens */
        .system-tokens-dropdown {
            display: none;
            width: 109%;
            margin: 12px 0;
            position: relative;
        }
        
        .system-tokens-dropdown-button {
            width: 100%;
            height: 50px;
            background: transparent;
            border: 2px solid #ffffff;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 0 15px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            transition: background 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
        }
        
        .system-tokens-dropdown-button:hover {
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #000000;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px #ffffff;
        }
        
        .system-tokens-dropdown-button::after {
            content: '▼';
            font-size: 12px;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .system-tokens-dropdown-button.active::after {
            transform: rotate(180deg);
        }
        
        .system-tokens-dropdown-menu {
            display: none;
            position: absolute;
            top: 100%;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            background: #000000;
            border: 2px solid #ffffff;
            border-top: none;
            z-index: 10;
            max-height: 200px;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        
        .system-tokens-dropdown-menu.show {
            display: block;
        }
        
        .system-tokens-dropdown-item {
            width: 100%;
            height: 45px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #ffffff;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0 15px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            transition: background 0.3s;
            text-align: left;
        }
        
        .system-tokens-dropdown-item:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }
        
        .system-tokens-dropdown-item:hover {
            background: rgb(255, 255, 255);
        }
        
        .system-tokens-dropdown-item.active {
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #000000;
        }
        .token-list {
            width: 100%;
            max-height: 500px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            margin-top: 5px; /* Reduced from 10px */
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
            border: 1px solid #ffffff;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
            font-size: 16px;
            text-align: left;
            position: relative; /* Added for filter button positioning */
            
        }

        /* Custom scrollbar styling for token lists */
        .token-list::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 12px;
        }

        .token-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #1a1a1a;
            border-radius: 6px;
        }

        .token-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #333333;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 2px solid #1a1a1a;
        }

        .token-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: #444444;
        }
        
        /* Special width for system tokens lists */
        #tokenListV1, #tokenListV2, #tokenListV3, #tokenListV4 {
            width: 108%;
        }
        
        @media screen and (max-width: 1550px) {
            #tokenListV1, #tokenListV2, #tokenListV3, #tokenListV4 {
                width: 100%;
            }
        }
        .token-list ul {
            list-style: none;
            padding: 10px;
            margin: 0;
            margin-top: 0; /* ensure no extra space above the list */
        }
        .token-row {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 12px 15px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #ffffff;
            min-height: 60px;
            transition: background 0.2s ease;
        }
        .token-row:hover {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        }
        .token-row:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }
        .token-logo {
            flex: 0 0 50px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        .token-logo img {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        .token-logo .symbol-fallback {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #333;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #96ffc8;
            border: 1px solid #ffffff;
        }
        .token-info {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 0 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 5px;
        }
        .token-info .name {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: bold;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }
        .copy-icon {
            cursor: pointer;
            color: #cccccc;
            font-size: 16px;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
            margin-top: 3px; /* Adjust this value to move the icon up (negative) or down (positive) */
        }
        .copy-icon:hover {
            color: #ffffff;
        }
        .copy-tooltip {
            position: absolute;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
            color: white;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 12px;
            pointer-events: none;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
        }
        .copy-tooltip.show {
            opacity: 1;
        }
        .token-info .symbol {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #cccccc;
        }
        .token-info .price {
            font-size: 16px;
            color: #96ffc8;
        }
        .token-profitability {
            flex: 0 0 120px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-start;
            font-size: 16px;
            padding-left: 10px;
        }
        .token-profitability.profitable {
            color: #00ff00;
        }
        .token-profitability.not-profitable {
            color: #808080;
        }
        .token-actions {
            flex: 0 0 100px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
        }
        .mint-button {
            width: auto;
            padding: 8px 20px;
            font-size: 14px;
            background: transparent;
            border: 2px solid #ffffff;
            color: #ffffff;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
        }
        .mint-button:hover {
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #000000;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px #ffffff;
        }
        .mint-button:disabled {
            opacity: 0.5;
            cursor: not-allowed;
        }
        .fast-mint-button {
            width: auto;
            padding: 8px 20px;
            font-size: 13px;
            background: transparent;
            border: 2px solid #00ff00;
            color: #00ff00;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
            margin-right: 8px;
            height: 36px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        .fast-mint-button:hover {
            background: #00ff00;
            color: #000000;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px #00ff00;
        }
        .fast-mint-button:disabled {
            opacity: 0.5;
            cursor: not-allowed;
        }
        .input-field {
            width: 80%;
            padding: 15px;
            margin: 15px 0;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
            border: 1px solid #ffffff;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
            font-size: 20px;
            outline: none;
        }
        .input-field::placeholder {
            color: #ffffff;
            opacity: 0.7;
        }
        button {
            width: 80%;
            padding: 15px;
            margin: 15px 0;
            background: transparent;
            border: 2px solid #ffffff;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
            font-size: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
        }
        button:hover {
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #000000;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px #ffffff;
        }
        .dropdown-container {
            position: relative;
            width: 80%;
            margin: 15px 0;
        }
        .dropdown-menu {
            display: none;
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%; /* Changed from top: 100% to bottom: 100% */
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
            border: 1px solid #ffffff;
            z-index: 3;
            margin-bottom: 10px; /* Added margin to create space between dropdown and button */
        }
        .dropdown-menu.active {
            display: block;
        }
        .dropdown-item {
            padding: 15px;
            color: #ffffff;
            text-align: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #ffffff;
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        .dropdown-item:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }
        .dropdown-item:hover {
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #000000;
        }
        .address-inputs {
            display: none;
            width: 80%;
            margin: 15px 0;
        }
        .address-inputs.active {
            display: block;
        }
        .token-button {
            position: fixed;
            top: 20px;
            left: 20px;
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            background: transparent;
            border: 2px solid #ffffff;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-size: 24px;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 3;
            margin-left: 10px; /* Add margin from left edge */
            transition: all 0.3s ease; /* Smooth transition */
        }
        .token-button:hover {
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #000000;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px #ffffff;
        }
        .token-popup, .create-token-popup, .mint-popup, .import-token-popup, .popup {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 90%;
            max-width: 600px;
            height: 80vh;
            max-height: 700px;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.973);
            border: 2px solid;
            border-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, #96ffc8, #00ff00) 1;
            z-index: 4;
            padding: 20px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        #importSpineTokenPopup {
            width: 300px;
            height: auto;
            max-height: 300px;
            padding: 20px;
        }

        #importSpineTokenPopup .popup-content {
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 15px;
        }

        #importSpineTokenPopup .close-button {
            position: absolute;
            top: -25px;
            right: -65px;
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: #96ffc8;
            font-size: 18px;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 0;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #importSpineTokenPopup .close-button:hover {
            color: #ff6b6b;
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }

        #importSpineTokenPopup input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 10px;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
            border: 1px solid #96ffc8;
            border-radius: 4px;
            color: #fff;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        #importSpineTokenPopup button.import-button {
            background: #96ffc8;
            color: #000;
            border: none;
            padding: 10px 20px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 14px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #importSpineTokenPopup button.import-button:hover {
            background: #7dffb9;
            transform: translateY(-1px);
        }
        .token-popup.active, .create-token-popup.active, .mint-popup.active, .import-token-popup.active {
            display: block;
        }

        .notification {
            position: fixed;
            top: 20px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
            border: 2px solid #96ffc8;
            color: #96ffc8;
            padding: 15px 30px;
            border-radius: 5px;
            z-index: 1000;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease-in-out;
            text-align: center;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.3);
        }

        .notification.show {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .token-popup h2, .create-token-popup h2, .mint-popup h2, .import-token-popup h2 {
            font-size: clamp(18px, 5vw, 24px);
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px #ffffff;
            text-align: center;
        }
        #tokenList {
            list-style: none;
            padding: 0;
            height: calc(100% - 60px);
            overflow-y: auto;
            margin-top: 20px;
            -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
        }
        #tokenList li {
            margin: 8px 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 10px;
            font-size: clamp(14px, 4vw, 16px);
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            position: relative;
            padding: 10px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        }
        .remove-token {
            position: absolute;
            top: 5px;
            left: 5px;
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            background: transparent;
            border: 1px solid #ffffff;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-size: 16px;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 0;
            margin: 0;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            z-index: 1;
        }
        .mint-button {
            padding: 8px 16px;
            font-size: clamp(12px, 3.5vw, 14px);
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        .mint-button:disabled {
            opacity: 0.5;
            cursor: not-allowed;
        }
        .mint-amount {
            width: 100px;
            padding: 8px;
            font-size: 16px;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
            border: 1px solid #ffffff;
            color: #ffffff;
        }
        .status-message {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #96ffc8;
            margin-top: 8px;
            width: 100%;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .wallet-container {
            position: absolute;
            top: 20px;
            right: 20px;
            width: auto;
            z-index: 3;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .wallet-button {
            width: 100%;
            height: 50px;
            padding: 0 20px;
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        .faq-button {
            width: auto;
            height: 50px;
            padding: 0 20px;
            font-size: 14px;
            background: transparent;
            border: 2px solid #ffffff;
            color: #ffffff;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-top: -10px; /* Added to move the button upwards */
            opacity: 1;
            visibility: visible;
        }
        .faq-button:hover {
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #000000;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px #ffffff;
        }
        .faq-button.hidden {
            opacity: 0;
            visibility: hidden;
        }
        .wallet-dropdown {
            top: 72px !important;
            width: 180px;
            right: 0;
            left: auto;
        }
        .close-button {
            position: absolute;
            top: 10px;
            right: 10px;
            width: 30px;
            height: 30px;
            background: transparent;
            border: 2px solid #ffffff;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-size: 16px;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 5;
        }
        .close-button:hover {
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #000000;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px #ffffff;
        }
        .minter-option {
            width: 80%;
            padding: 15px;
            margin: 10px 0;
            background: transparent;
            border: 2px solid #ffffff;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
            font-size: 18px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .minter-option:hover {
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #000000;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px #ffffff;
        }
        @media (max-width: 1550px) {
            .overlay, .overlay2, .overlay3, .overlay4, .overlay5 {
                position: relative;
                top: auto;
                left: 50%;
                transform: translateX(-50%);
                margin: 20px auto;
                margin-left: 0; /* Remove the offset in mobile view */
                width: 90%;
                max-width: 750px;
                height: auto;
                min-height: 750px;
            }
            .overlay {
                order: 5;
            }
            .overlay3 {
                order: 4;
            }
            .overlay2 {
                order: 1;
                margin-top: 40px;
            }
            .overlay4 {
                order: 3;
            }
            .overlay5 {
                order: 2;
            }
            .underline, .tab-container, .token-list {
                width: 100%;
            }
            body {
                padding: 20px;
                min-height: auto;
                display: flex;
                flex-direction: column;
            }
        }
        .token-type-selector {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        /* Scrollable V4 token selector */
        #tokenListV4 .token-type-selector {
            display: block;
            overflow-x: auto;
            overflow-y: hidden;
            white-space: nowrap;
            padding: 10px 0;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            max-width: 100%;
            /* Custom scrollbar styling */
            scrollbar-width: thin;
            scrollbar-color: #96ffc8 #333;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar {
            height: 8px;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #333;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #96ffc8;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: #ffffff;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type {
            display: inline-block;
            white-space: nowrap;
            margin-right: 20px;
            margin-left: 10px;
            padding: 5px 15px;
            padding-top: 25px;
            color: white;
            text-decoration: underline;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type.active {
            color: #96ffc8;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type:hover {
            color: #96ffc8;
        }

        /* Scrollable V3 token selector */
        #tokenListV3 .token-type-selector {
            display: block;
            overflow-x: auto;
            overflow-y: hidden;
            white-space: nowrap;
            padding: 10px 0;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            max-width: 100%;
            /* Custom scrollbar styling */
            scrollbar-width: thin;
            scrollbar-color: #96ffc9dd #333;
        }

        #tokenListV3 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar {
            height: 8px;
        }

        #tokenListV3 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #333;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #tokenListV3 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #96ffc8;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #tokenListV3 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: #ffffff;
        }

        #tokenListV3 .token-type {
            display: inline-block;
            white-space: nowrap;
            margin-right: 20px;
            margin-left: 10px;
            padding: 5px 15px;
            padding-top: 25px;
            color: white;
            text-decoration: underline;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }

        #tokenListV3 .token-type.active {
            color: #96ffc8;
        }

        #tokenListV3 .token-type:hover {
            color: #96ffc8;
        }

        .token-type {
            color: white;
            text-decoration: underline;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 5px 10px;
            padding-top: 25px; /* Added 2px to move text down */

        .faq-popup {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.955);
            border: 2px solid #ffffff;
            padding: 20px;
            width: 600px;
            height: 800px;
            max-width: 90vw;
            max-height: 90vh;
            overflow-y: auto;
            z-index: 1000;
        }
        .faq-popup.active {
            display: block;
        }
        .faq-popup h2 {
            color: #ffffff;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .faq-item {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            color: #ffffff;
        }
        .faq-question {
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            color: #96ffc8;
        }
        .faq-answer {
            line-height: 1.5;
        }
        /* Add blur effect styles */
        body.faq-active {
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        body.faq-active canvas {
            filter: blur(5px);
            transition: filter 0.3s ease;
        }
        body.faq-active .overlay,
        body.faq-active .overlay2 {
            filter: blur(5px);
            transition: filter 0.3s ease;
        }
        .faq-popup {
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            opacity: 0;
        }
        .faq-popup.active {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        /* Vote-specific styles */
        
        /* Fix underline and tab-container width for overlay5 only */
        .overlay5 .underline {
            width: 100%;
        }
        
        .overlay5 .tab-container {
            width: 100%;
        }
        
        .vote-content {
            display: none;
            width: 100%;
            height: calc(100% - 150px);
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        
        .vote-content.active {
            display: block;
        }
        
        /* Enhanced tab styling */
        .overlay5 .tab {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;

        }
        
        .tab-icon {
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        
        .tab-text {
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
        }
        
        /* Proposal submission card */
        .proposal-submission-card {
            background: rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.05);
            border: 2px solid rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.3);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 25px;
            margin-bottom: 25px;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }
        
        .submission-title {
            color: #96ffc8;
            font-size: 20px;
            margin: 0 0 20px 0;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .submission-form {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        
        .input-group {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
        }
        
        .input-group label {
            color: #ffffff;

            font-weight: 500;
            margin-left: 5px;
        }
        
        .vote-input {
            width: 100%;
            height: 45px;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 8px;
            color: #ffffff;

            font-size: 16px;
            padding: 0 15px;

        }
        
        .vote-input:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #96ffc8;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.3);
        }
        
        .vote-input::placeholder {
            color: #999999;
        }
        
        /* File upload area */
        .file-upload-area {
            width: 100%;
            height: 120px;
            border: 2px dashed rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);

            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .file-upload-area:hover {
            border-color: #96ffc8;

            justify-content: center;

            font-size: 32px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        /* Scrollable V4 token selector */
        #tokenListV4 .token-type-selector {
            display: block;
            overflow-x: auto;
            overflow-y: hidden;
            white-space: nowrap;
            padding: 10px 0;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            max-width: 100%;
            /* Custom scrollbar styling */
            scrollbar-width: thin;
            scrollbar-color: #96ffc8 #333;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar {
            height: 8px;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #333;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #96ffc8;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: #ffffff;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type {
            display: inline-block;
            white-space: nowrap;
            margin-right: 20px;
            margin-left: 10px;
            padding: 5px 15px;
            padding-top: 25px;
            color: white;
            text-decoration: underline;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type.active {
            color: #96ffc8;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type:hover {
            color: #96ffc8;
        }

        .faq-popup {
            display: none;

            top: 50%;

            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.955);

        .faq-popup.active {

        }
        /* Add blur effect styles */
        body.faq-active {
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        body.faq-active canvas {
            filter: blur(5px);
            transition: filter 0.3s ease;
        }
        body.faq-active .overlay,
        body.faq-active .overlay2 {
            filter: blur(5px);
            transition: filter 0.3s ease;
        }
        .faq-popup {
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            opacity: 0;
        }
        .faq-popup.active {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        /* Vote-specific styles */
        
        /* Fix underline and tab-container width for overlay5 only */

        /* Proposal submission card */
        .proposal-submission-card {
            background: rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.05);

            padding: 25px;
            margin-bottom: 25px;

        }
        
        .submission-title {
            color: #96ffc8;

            margin: 0 0 20px 0;

        .submission-form {
            display: flex;

            gap: 20px;
        }

        .vote-input {

        /* File upload area */
        .file-upload-area {

            margin-bottom: 8px;

        .token-type-selector {

        /* Scrollable V4 token selector */
        #tokenListV4 .token-type-selector {
            display: block;
            overflow-x: auto;
            overflow-y: hidden;
            white-space: nowrap;
            padding: 10px 0;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            max-width: 100%;
            /* Custom scrollbar styling */
            scrollbar-width: thin;
            scrollbar-color: #96ffc8 #333;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar {
            height: 8px;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #333;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #96ffc8;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: #ffffff;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type {
            display: inline-block;
            white-space: nowrap;
            margin-right: 20px;
            margin-left: 10px;
            padding: 5px 15px;
            padding-top: 25px;
            color: white;
            text-decoration: underline;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type.active {
            color: #96ffc8;
        }

        #tokenListV4 .token-type:hover {
            color: #96ffc8;
        }

            overflow-y: hidden;

            /* Custom scrollbar styling */
            scrollbar-width: thin;
            scrollbar-color: #96ffc9dd #333;
        }

        #tokenListV3 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar {
            height: 8px;
        }

        #tokenListV3 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #333;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #tokenListV3 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #96ffc8;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #tokenListV3 .token-type-selector::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: #ffffff;
        }

        #tokenListV3 .token-type {
            display: inline-block;
            white-space: nowrap;

        .token-type {
            color: white;
            text-decoration: underline;
            cursor: pointer;

            padding-top: 25px; /* Added 2px to move text down */

        .faq-popup {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.955);
            border: 2px solid #ffffff;
            padding: 20px;
            width: 600px;
            height: 800px;
            max-width: 90vw;
            max-height: 90vh;
            overflow-y: auto;
            z-index: 1000;
        }
        .faq-popup.active {
            display: block;
        }
        .faq-popup h2 {
            color: #ffffff;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .faq-item {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            color: #ffffff;
        }
        .faq-question {
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            color: #96ffc8;
        }
        .faq-answer {
            line-height: 1.5;
        }
        /* Add blur effect styles */
        body.faq-active {
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        body.faq-active canvas {
            filter: blur(5px);
            transition: filter 0.3s ease;
        }
        body.faq-active .overlay,
        body.faq-active .overlay2 {
            filter: blur(5px);
            transition: filter 0.3s ease;
        }
        .faq-popup {
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            opacity: 0;
        }
        .faq-popup.active {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        /* Vote-specific styles */
        
        /* Fix underline and tab-container width for overlay5 only */
        .overlay5 .underline {
            width: 100%;
        }
        
        .overlay5 .tab-container {
            width: 100%;
        }
        
        .vote-content {
            display: none;
            width: 100%;
            height: calc(100% - 150px);
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        
        .vote-content.active {
            display: block;
        }
        
        /* Enhanced tab styling */
        .overlay5 .tab {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            font-size: 15px;
            font-weight: 500;
        }
        
        .tab-icon {
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        
        .tab-text {
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
        }
        
        /* Proposal submission card */
        .proposal-submission-card {
            background: rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.05);
            border: 2px solid rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.3);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 25px;
            margin-bottom: 25px;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }
        
        .submission-title {
            color: #96ffc8;
            font-size: 20px;
            margin: 0 0 20px 0;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .submission-form {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 20px;
        }
        
        .input-group {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
        }
        
        .input-group label {
            color: #ffffff;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 500;
            margin-left: 5px;
        }
        
        .vote-input {
            width: 100%;
            height: 45px;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 8px;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
            font-size: 16px;
            padding: 0 15px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .vote-input:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #96ffc8;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.3);
        }
        
        .vote-input::placeholder {
            color: #999999;
        }
        
        /* File upload area */
        .file-upload-area {
            width: 100%;
            height: 120px;
            border: 2px dashed rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .file-upload-area:hover {
            border-color: #96ffc8;
            background: rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.05);
        }
        
        .upload-placeholder {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;

        .upload-icon {

        .upload-text {

        .upload-subtext {

        .upload-preview {

            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
        }
        
        .upload-preview img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;

            border-radius: 6px;
        }
        
        .preview-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;

            bottom: 0;

            justify-content: center;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;

            font-size: 14px;

        }
        
        /* Enhanced buttons */

            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.2), rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.2));
            border: 2px solid #96ffc8;
            border-radius: 50%;
            color: #96ffc8;
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: bold;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        .add-proposal-btn:hover {
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, #96ffc8, #00ff00);
            color: #000000;
            transform: scale(1.1) rotate(90deg);
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.6);
        }
        
        .plus-icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .proposals-list, .approved-list {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 15px;
        }
        
        /* Enhanced proposal cards */
        .proposal-item {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08), rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.03));
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 15px;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            min-height: 80px;
        }
        
        .proposal-item:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.15);
            border-color: rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.4);
        }
        
        .proposal-item::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 3px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #96ffc8, #00ff00);
        }
        
        .proposal-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        
        .proposal-id {
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #96ffc8;
        }
        
        .proposal-status {
            padding: 4px 10px;
            border-radius: 15px;
            font-size: 10px;
            font-weight: bold;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
        }
        
        .proposal-status.active {
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, #00ff00, #96ffc8);
            color: #000000;
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }
        
        .proposal-status.approved {
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, #96ffc8, #ffffff);
            color: #000000;
        }
        
        @keyframes pulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
            50% { opacity: 0.7; }
        }
        
        .proposal-content {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
        }
        
        .proposal-left {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            flex: 1;
            min-width: 0;
        }
        
        .proposal-logo {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            object-fit: cover;
            border: 2px solid #96ffc8;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        
        .proposal-logo-placeholder {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 2px solid #96ffc8;
            background: rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.1);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 24px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        
        .proposal-info {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 4px;
            min-width: 0;
        }
        
        .proposal-token {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 500;
        }
        
        .token-name-symbol {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            min-width: 0;
        }
        
        .token-name {
            color: #ffffff;
            font-weight: bold;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            max-width: 120px;
        }
        
        .token-symbol {
            color: #96ffc8;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: normal;
        }
        
        .proposal-proposer {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #cccccc;
            opacity: 0.8;
        }
        
        .proposal-center {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-start;
            gap: 25px;
        }
        
        .vote-counts {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 20px;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            border-radius: 20px;
        }
        
        .vote-count {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            font-weight: 500;
        }
        
        .vote-emoji {
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        
        .vote-number {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: bold;
            min-width: 25px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        
        .vote-count.yes {
            color: #00ff00;
        }
        
        .vote-count.no {
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        
        .proposal-right {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        
        .vote-buttons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
        }
        
        .vote-yes, .vote-no {
            width: 50px;
            height: 35px;
            border: 2px solid;
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: bold;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        
        .vote-yes {
            border-color: #00ff00;
            color: #00ff00;
        }
        
        .vote-yes:hover {
            background: #00ff00;
            color: #000000;
            transform: translateY(-1px);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.3);
        }
        
        .vote-no {
            border-color: #ff6b6b;
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        
        .vote-no:hover {
            background: #ff6b6b;
            color: #000000;
            transform: translateY(-1px);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(255, 107, 107, 0.3);
        }
        
        .retract-btn {
            border: 2px solid #ffffff;
            color: #ffffff;
            background: transparent;
            border-radius: 6px;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            font-size: 10px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 4px;
            margin-top: -10px;
        }
        
        .retract-btn:hover {
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #000000;
            transform: translateY(-1px);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
        }
        
       
        
        .loading {
            text-align: center;
            color: #96ffc8;
            font-style: italic;
            padding: 40px;
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        
        .loading::before {
            content: '';
            font-size: 20px;
        }
        
        .no-proposals {
            margin-top: 20px;
            text-align: center;
            color: #cccccc;
            padding: 40px;
            font-size: 16px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            border-radius: 12px;
            border: 1px dashed rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
        }
        
        .no-proposals::before {
            font-size: 24px;
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        
        /* Proposal Popup Styles */
        .proposal-popup {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            z-index: 1000;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            opacity: 0;
            visibility: hidden;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .proposal-popup.active {
            opacity: 1;
            visibility: visible;
        }
        
        .proposal-popup-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }
        
        .proposal-popup-content {
            position: relative;
            width: 90%;
            max-width: 500px;
            max-height: 90vh;
            overflow-y: auto;
            background: #000000;
            border: 2px solid #96ffc8;
            border-radius: 15px;
            padding: 0;
            transform: scale(0.8);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .proposal-popup.active .proposal-popup-content {
            transform: scale(1);
        }
        
        .proposal-popup .close-button {
            position: absolute;
            top: 15px;
            right: 15px;
            width: 30px;
            height: 30px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 50%;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: bold;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            z-index: 10;
        }
        
        .proposal-popup .close-button:hover {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }
        
        .proposal-popup .proposal-submission-card {
            margin: 0;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 15px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.1), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8));
        }

        /* Titled Proposal Styles */
        .titled-proposal {
            border-left: 4px solid #96ffc8;
        }

        .proposal-title {
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        .title-text {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #ffffff;
            line-height: 1.3;
        }

        .info-button {
            width: 80px;
            height: 35px;
            border: 2px solid #96ffc8;
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            color: #96ffc8;
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: bold;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 4px;
        }

        .info-button:hover {
            background: #96ffc8;
            color: #000000;
            transform: translateY(-1px);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.3);
        }

        /* Proposal Type Styles */
        .proposal-type {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 4px;
            margin-bottom: 2px;
            padding: 4px 10px;
            background: rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.1);
            border-radius: 15px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.3);
        }

        .type-label {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #cccccc;
            font-weight: normal;
        }

        .type-value {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #96ffc8;
            font-weight: bold;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
        }



        /* Titled Proposal Popup Styles */
        .titled-proposal-details {
            padding: 30px;
        }

        .proposal-popup-title {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #ffffff;
            margin: 0 0 15px 0;
            line-height: 1.3;
        }

        .title-divider {
            border: none;
            height: 2px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #96ffc8, #00ff00);
            margin: 15px 0 20px 0;
        }

        .proposal-popup-description {
            color: #cccccc;
            font-size: 14px;
            line-height: 1.6;
            margin-bottom: 25px;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
        }

        .popup-vote-section {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 20px;
            padding-top: 20px;
            border-top: 1px solid rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.2);
        }

        .popup-vote-buttons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
        }

        /* Logo Popup Styles */
        .logo-popup {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            z-index: 1000;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            opacity: 0;
            visibility: hidden;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .logo-popup.active {
            opacity: 1;
            visibility: visible;
        }
        
        .logo-popup-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }
        
        .logo-popup-content {
            position: relative;
            max-width: 80vw;
            max-height: 80vh;
            transform: scale(0.8);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .logo-popup.active .logo-popup-content {
            transform: scale(1);
        }
        
        .logo-popup .close-button {
            position: absolute;
            top: -15px;
            right: -15px;
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
            border: 2px solid #96ffc8;
            border-radius: 50%;
            color: #96ffc8;
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: bold;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            z-index: 10;
        }
        
        .logo-popup .close-button:hover {
            background: #96ffc8;
            color: #000000;
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }
        
        .logo-popup-image {
            max-width: 100%;
            max-height: 100%;
            border-radius: 10px;
            border: 3px solid #96ffc8;
            box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.5);
        }

        .clickable-logo {
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .clickable-logo:hover {
            transform: scale(1.05);
            box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.5);
        }

        /* Mobile Responsive Styles */
        @media screen and (max-width: 1200px) {
            .overlay, .overlay2, .overlay5 {
                width: 90%;
                height: auto;
                min-height: 700px;
                margin-left: 0;
                position: relative;
                top: 0;
                left: 0;
                transform: none;
                margin: 20px auto;
            }
            
            .token-list {
                width: 100%;
              
            }
            
            .tab-container {
                width: 100%;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
            }
            
            .tab {
                flex: 1 1 50%;
                border-right: 2px solid #ffffff;
            }
            
            .tab:nth-child(2n) {
                border-right: 2px solid #ffffff;
            }
            
            .tab:last-child {
                border-right: 2px solid #ffffff;
            }
        }
        
        @media screen and (max-width: 850px) {
            body {
                padding: 10px;
            }
            
            h1 {
                font-size: 24px;
            }
            
            /* System Token Box Mobile Improvements */
            .token-list {
                width: 100% !important;
                max-height: 600px;
                margin-top: 5px;
            }
            
            #tokenListV1, #tokenListV2, #tokenListV3, #tokenListV4 {
                width: 100% !important;
            }
            
            .token-row {
                flex-direction: row;
                min-height: 60px;
                padding: 8px 12px;
                gap: 8px;
                align-items: center;
                border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
            }

            .token-logo {
                flex: 0 0 35px;
                margin-right: 5px;
            }

            .token-info {
                padding: 0 8px;
                align-items: flex-start;
                text-align: left;
                flex: 1;
                min-width: 0; /* Allow text to truncate */
                overflow: hidden;
            }

            .token-info .name {
                font-size: 15px;
                font-weight: 600;
                white-space: nowrap;
                overflow: hidden;
                text-overflow: ellipsis;
                max-width: 100%;
                line-height: 1.2;
            }
            
            .token-info .symbol {
                font-size: 12px;
                color: #cccccc;
                margin-top: 2px;
            }
            
            .token-info .price {
                font-size: 13px;
                color: #96ffc8;

            }

            .token-profitability {

                padding-left: 5px;
            }

            .token-actions {
                width: auto;
                justify-content: flex-end;
                flex: 0 0 75px;
                gap: 5px;
            }
            
            .tab {
                font-size: 12px;
                height: 40px;
            }

            .token-logo img, .token-logo .symbol-fallback {

            }

            .mint-button {
                padding: 6px 10px;

            }
            
            .fast-mint-button {
                padding: 6px 8px;
                font-size: 10px;
                min-width: 45px;
                height: 30px;
                margin-right: 4px;
            }
            
            /* Search and Filter Button Mobile Adjustments */
            .search-button, .filter-button {
                width: 22px;
                height: 22px;
            }
            
            .search-input {
                font-size: 14px;
                padding: 8px 12px;
                margin: 5px 0;
            }
            
            /* Token Type Selector Mobile */
            .token-type-selector {
                flex-wrap: wrap;
                gap: 5px;
                margin: 8px 0;
            }
            
            .token-type {
                font-size: 15px;
                padding: 4px 8px;
                margin: 2px;
                border-radius: 12px;
                white-space: nowrap;
            }
        }
        
        @media screen and (max-width: 480px) {
            .overlay, .overlay2, .overlay3, .overlay4, .overlay5 {
                width: 95%;

            }
            
            .tab {

            }
            
            /* Extra small screen token list improvements */

            }
            
            .token-info .symbol {

            }
            
            .token-info .price {

            }
            
            .token-profitability {

            }
            
            .token-actions {

            .fast-mint-button {

            /* Token type selector for very small screens */

            /* Search input for very small screens */

        /* Mobile styles for Vote box and Proposal columns */
        @media screen and (max-width: 850px) {

        @media screen and (max-width: 480px) {
            .overlay5 {
                width: 95%;
                padding: 15px;
                margin: 10px auto;
            }

            .proposal-item {
                padding: 50px;
            }

            .proposal-status {
                position: absolute;
                top: 10px;

        .notification {
            position: fixed;
            top: 20px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
            border: 2px solid #96ffc8;
            color: #96ffc8;
            padding: 15px 30px;
            border-radius: 5px;
            z-index: 1000;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease-in-out;
            text-align: center;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.3);
        }

        .notification.show {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .filter-button {
            position: absolute;
            top: 10px;
            left: 10px;
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            cursor: pointer;
            z-index: 2;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        #filterButtonV2 {
            left: 4px;
            
            top: 2px;
        }

        .filter-button:hover {
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }

        .filter-button svg {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            fill: #ffffff;
        }

        .filter-button.active {

        }

        .search-button {
            position: absolute;
            top: 31px;
            left: 40px;
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
            z-index: 2;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        #searchButtonV2 {
            left: 34px;
            top: 2px;
        }

        .search-button:hover {
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }

        .search-button svg {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            fill: #ffffff;
        }

        .search-button:hover svg {
            fill: #96ffc8;
        }

        .search-input {
            position: absolute;
            top: 40px;
            left: 10px;
            width: calc(100% - 20px);
            padding: 8px;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
            border: 1px solid #ffffff;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            z-index: 3;
            display: none;
            box-sizing: border-box;

        .search-input::placeholder {
            color: #888888;

        .search-input:focus {

        /* Fullscreen Button Styles */
        .fullscreen-button {
            position: absolute;
            top: 4px;
            left: 4px;
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            cursor: pointer;
            z-index: 3;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        .fullscreen-button:hover {
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }

        .fullscreen-button svg {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            fill: #ffffff;
        }

        .fullscreen-button:hover svg {
            fill: #96ffc8;
        }

        /* Fullscreen overlay styles */
        .overlay2.fullscreen {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100vw;
            height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            transform: none;
            z-index: 1000;
            padding: 5px 100px 100px 100px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        .overlay2.fullscreen .token-list {
            max-height: calc(100vh - 280px);
            width: 100%;
        }

        /* Ensure fullscreen works properly on all devices */
        body.fullscreen-active {
            overflow: hidden !important;
            position: fixed !important;
            width: 100vw !important;
            height: 100vh !important;
            top: 0 !important;
            left: 0 !important;
            padding: 0 !important;
            margin: 0 !important;
        }

        /* Hide canvas in fullscreen mode to prevent interference */
        body.fullscreen-active canvas {
            display: none;
        }

        /* Laptop screen optimizations for fullscreen */
        @media screen and (min-width: 1024px) and (max-width: 1366px) {
            .overlay2.fullscreen .token-list {
                max-height: calc(100vh - 260px);
                width: 100%;
            }
        }

        /* Larger laptop/desktop screen optimizations */
        @media screen and (min-width: 1367px) {
            .overlay2.fullscreen .token-list {
                max-height: calc(100vh - 120px);
                min-height: calc(100vh - 220px);
                width: 100%;
            }
        }

        /* Additional fullscreen optimizations for very small screens */
        @media screen and (max-width: 320px) {
            .overlay2.fullscreen {
                padding: 0px 8px 8px 8px;
            }
            
            .overlay2.fullscreen .token-list {
                max-height: calc(100vh - 70px);
            }
            
            .overlay2.fullscreen h1 {
                font-size: 16px;
                margin-bottom: 5px;
            }
            
            .fullscreen-button {
                width: 30px;
                height: 30px;
                top: 8px;
                left: 8px;
            }
        }

        /* Landscape orientation optimizations */
        @media screen and (max-height: 500px) and (orientation: landscape) {
            .overlay2.fullscreen {
                padding: 2px 10px 10px 10px;
            }
            
            .overlay2.fullscreen .token-list {
                max-height: calc(100vh - 60px);
                min-height: calc(100vh - 60px);
            }
            
            .overlay2.fullscreen h1 {
                font-size: 16px;
                margin-bottom: 5px;
            }
        }

        /* Better laptop landscape optimization */
        @media screen and (min-height: 501px) and (max-height: 900px) and (orientation: landscape) {
            .overlay2.fullscreen .token-list {
                max-height: calc(100vh - 200px);
            }
        }
        
        /* Ultra-small screen landscape optimizations */
        @media screen and (max-width: 280px) and (orientation: landscape) {
            .overlay2.fullscreen {
                padding: 1px 4px 4px 4px;
            }
            
            .overlay2.fullscreen .token-list {
                max-height: calc(100vh - 40px);
            }
            
            .overlay2.fullscreen h1 {
                font-size: 12px;
                margin-bottom: 2px;
            }
        }
        
        @media screen and (max-width: 240px) and (orientation: landscape) {
            .overlay2.fullscreen {
                padding: 1px 2px 2px 2px;
            }
            
            .overlay2.fullscreen .token-list {
                max-height: calc(100vh - 35px);
            }
            
            .overlay2.fullscreen h1 {
                font-size: 10px;
                margin-bottom: 1px;
            }
        }
        
        @media screen and (max-width: 200px) and (orientation: landscape) {
            .overlay2.fullscreen {
                padding: 0px 1px 1px 1px;
            }
            
            .overlay2.fullscreen .token-list {
                max-height: calc(100vh - 30px);
            }
            
            .overlay2.fullscreen h1 {
                font-size: 8px;
                margin-bottom: 1px;
            }
        }

        /* Ensure fullscreen works with different zoom levels and high DPI displays */
        .overlay2.fullscreen {
            min-height: 100vh;
            min-width: 100vw;
            max-height: 100vh;
            max-width: 100vw;
        }

        /* iOS Safari specific fixes for fullscreen */
        @supports (-webkit-touch-callout: none) {
            .overlay2.fullscreen {
                height: 100vh;
                height: -webkit-fill-available;
                top: 0 !important;
                margin-top: 0 !important;
                padding-top: 0 !important;
            }
            
            body.fullscreen-active {
                height: 100vh;
                height: -webkit-fill-available;
                margin: 0 !important;
                padding: 0 !important;
            }
        }

        /* Additional mobile fullscreen fixes */
        @media screen and (max-width: 850px) {
            .overlay2.fullscreen {
                position: fixed !important;
                top: 0 !important;
                left: 0 !important;
                right: 0 !important;
                bottom: 0 !important;
                width: 100vw !important;
                height: 100vh !important;
                height: -webkit-fill-available !important;
                margin: 0 !important;
                padding: 0 !important;
                border: none !important;
                border-radius: 0 !important;
                transform: none !important;
                z-index: 9999 !important;
            }
            
            body.fullscreen-active {
                position: fixed !important;
                top: 0 !important;
                left: 0 !important;
                width: 100% !important;
                height: 100% !important;
                margin: 0 !important;
                padding: 0 !important;
                overflow: hidden !important;
            }
        }

/*spine column*/
.spine-column {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
    border: 1px solid #96ffc8;
    padding: 20px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    width: 500px;
    margin: 10px auto;
    position: relative;
}

@media screen and (max-width: 850px) {
    .spine-column {
        width: 85%;
        padding: 15px;
    }
}

.spine-column .token-parent .copy-icon {
    margin-left: 10px;
    cursor: pointer;
}

.UsrInfiniteMintButton {
    position: absolute;
    width: 90px;
    height: 50px;
    right: 25px;
    top: 40%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    background: #96ffc8;
    color: #000;
    border: none;
    padding: 8px 16px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 14px;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
}

@media screen and (max-width: 850px) {
    .UsrInfiniteMintButton {
        width: 70px;
        height: 40px;
        right: 15px;
        font-size: 12px;
        padding: 6px 12px;
    }
}

.UsrInfiniteMintButton:hover {
    background: #7dffb9;
    transform: translateY(-50%) scale(1.05);
    box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.3);
}

.UsrInfiniteMintButton:disabled {
    background: #4a4a4a;
    cursor: not-allowed;
    opacity: 0.7;
}

.UsrInfiniteMintButton .status-dot.active {
    background: #00ff00;
}

.spine-close-btn {
    position: absolute;
    top: -5px;
    left: 10px;
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    color: #96ffc8;
    font-size: 16px;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 0;
    border-radius: 50%;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.spine-close-btn:hover {
    color: #ff6b6b;
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.spine-token-label {

}

@media screen and (max-width: 850px) {

        font-size: 16px;
    }
}

.spine-add-btn {
    background: #96ffc8;

    border: none;
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    font-size: 24px;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 30%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);

    z-index: 2;
}

    .spine-add-btn {
        width: 35px;
        height: 35px;
        font-size: 20px;
    }
}

.spine-add-btn:hover {
    box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(150, 255, 201, 0.357);
}

.spine-column h1 {
    width: 100%;
    text-align: left;
    margin: 0 0 20px 0;
    padding: 0;
    color: #96ffc8;

    min-height: 100px;
}

@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);

    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
