.spine-share-btn {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 20px;
    width: 270px;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    background: linear-gradient(45deg, #00ff00, #96ffc8);
    color: #000000;
    border: none;
    padding: 12px 24px;
    border-radius: 25px;
    font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: bold;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.3);
    z-index: 10;
}

.spine-share-btn:hover {
    background: linear-gradient(45deg, #96ffc8, #00ff00);
    box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.6);
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-2px);
}

.spine-share-btn:disabled {
    background: #666;
    color: #999;
    cursor: not-allowed;
    box-shadow: none;
}

.community-spine-item {
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
    border: 1px solid #ffffff;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 15px;
    margin: 10px 0;
    transition: background 0.3s ease;
}


.spine-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.spine-owner {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #96ffc8;
}

.spine-timestamp {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #ccc;
}

.spine-tokens {
    margin: 10px 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: max-height 0.3s ease, opacity 0.3s ease;
}

.spine-token {
    background: rgba(13, 16, 14, 0.1);
    border: 1px solid #96ffc8;
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 8px;
    margin: 5px 0;
    font-size: 14px;
}

.spine-infinite-mint-btn {
    background: #96ffc8;
    color: #000000;
    border: none;
    padding: 8px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: bold;
    transition: background 0.3s ease;
    margin-left: 500px;
    margin-top: -60px;
    width: 60px;
    height: 40px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.spine-infinite-mint-btn:hover {
    background: #ffffff;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px #96ffc8;
}

.spine-infinite-mint-btn:disabled {
    background: #555;
    color: #999;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.delete-spine-btn {
    background: #ff4444;
    color: white;
    border: none;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 12px;
    transition: background 0.3s ease;
}

.delete-spine-btn:hover {
    background: #ff6666;
}


.spine-column-box .spine-content {
    max-height: calc(100% - 150px);
    overflow-x: hidden;
    padding-bottom: 20px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}
        

.spine-toggle {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 10px;
    background: rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.05);
    border-radius: 4px;
    margin: 5px 0;
    transition: background 0.3s ease;
}

.spine-toggle:hover {
    background: rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.1);
}

.spine-toggle-info {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 15px;
}

.spine-toggle-arrow {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #96ffc8;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
    user-select: none;
}

.spine-toggle-arrow.expanded {
    transform: rotate(180deg);
}

.spine-tokens.collapsed {
    max-height: 0;
    opacity: 0;
    margin: 0;
}

.spine-tokens.expanded {
    max-height: 10000px;
    opacity: 1;
}


@media screen and (max-width: 850px) {
    .spine-infinite-mint-btn {
        position: relative;
        margin-left: 0;
        margin-top: 8px;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 120px;
        height: 35px;
        font-size: 12px;
        margin-bottom: 5px;
    }
}


@media screen and (max-width: 850px) {
    .spine-token {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: stretch;
        position: relative;
    }
    
    .spine-token-info {
        margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

}

@media screen and (max-width: 850px) {
    .spine-tokens.expanded {
        max-height: 20000px; /* or even higher if needed */
    }
}

.community-dropdown {
    display: none;
    position: relative;
    width: 109%;
    margin: 12px 0;
}

.community-dropdown-button {
    width: 100%;
    height: 50px;
    background: transparent;
    border: 2px solid #ffffff;
    color: #ffffff;
    font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 0 15px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.community-dropdown-button:hover {
    background: #ffffff;
    color: #000000;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px #ffffff;
}

.community-dropdown-button::after {
    content: '▼';
    font-size: 12px;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

.community-dropdown-button.open::after {
    transform: rotate(180deg);
}

.community-dropdown-menu {
    display: none;
    position: absolute;
    top: 100%;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    background: #000000;
    border: 2px solid #ffffff;
    border-top: none;
    z-index: 10;
}

.community-dropdown-menu.show {
    display: block;
}

.community-dropdown-item {
    width: 100%;
    height: 45px;
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #ffffff;
    color: #ffffff;
    font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.3s;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.community-dropdown-item:last-child {
    border-bottom: none;
}

.community-dropdown-item:hover {
    background: #ffffff;
    color: #000000;
}

.community-dropdown-item.active {
    background: #ffffff;
    color: #000000;
}

/* Update mobile styles */
@media screen and (max-width: 850px) {
    /* Hide regular tabs and show dropdown on mobile */
    .overlay4 .tab-container {
        display: none;
    }
    
    .community-dropdown {
        display: block;
    }
}

/* Info Icon Styles */
.info-icon {
    position: absolute;
    top: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    width: 30px;
    height: 30px;
    background: transparent;
    border: 2px solid #96ffc8;
    border-radius: 50%;
    color: #96ffc8;
    font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: bold;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    z-index: 10;
}

.info-icon:hover {
    background: #96ffc8;
    color: #000000;
    transform: scale(1.1);
    box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.5);
}

/* How It Works Popup Styles */
.how-it-works-popup {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    z-index: 1001;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    opacity: 0;
    visibility: hidden;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.how-it-works-popup.active {
    opacity: 1;
    visibility: visible;
}

.how-it-works-popup .proposal-popup-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.how-it-works-popup .proposal-popup-content {
    position: relative;
    width: 90%;
    max-width: 600px;
    max-height: 90vh;
    overflow-y: auto;
    background: #000000;
    border: 2px solid #96ffc8;
    border-radius: 15px;
    padding: 40px;
    transform: scale(0.8);
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

.how-it-works-popup.active .proposal-popup-content {
    transform: scale(1);
}

.how-it-works-title {
    color: #ffffff;
    font-size: 28px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    text-align: center;
    text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
}

.how-it-works-content {
    color: #ffffff;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-size: 16px;
}

.how-it-works-section {
    margin-bottom: 25px;
}

.how-it-works-section h3 {
    color: #96ffc8;
    font-size: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.3);
    padding-bottom: 5px;
}

.how-it-works-section p {
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.how-it-works-section ul {
    margin-left: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.how-it-works-section li {
    margin-bottom: 5px;
}

/* Custom scrollbar for How It Works popup */
.how-it-works-popup .proposal-popup-content::-webkit-scrollbar {
    width: 8px;
}

.how-it-works-popup .proposal-popup-content::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
    background: #1a1a1a;
    border-radius: 4px;
}

.how-it-works-popup .proposal-popup-content::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
    background: #333333;
    border-radius: 4px;
    border: 1px solid #2a2a2a;
}

.how-it-works-popup .proposal-popup-content::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
    background: #444444;
}

/* Firefox scrollbar styling */
.how-it-works-popup .proposal-popup-content {
    scrollbar-width: thin;
    scrollbar-color: #333333 #1a1a1a;
}

<body>

        <div id="v3Inputs" class="address-inputs" style="display: none;">

            <input type="text" class="input-field" id="tokenSymbol" placeholder="Token Symbol (e.g., MTK)">

    <div id="mintPopup" class="mint-popup">
        <button class="close-button" onclick="toggleMintPopup()">X</button>
        <h2>Mint Tokens</h2>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 87%;">
            <div style="flex: 1;">
                <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
                    <input type="number" class="input-field" id="mintAmount" placeholder="Enter amount to mint" min="1" style="width: auto;" oninput="updateParentTokenEquivalent()">
                    <span id="parentTokenEquivalent" style="color: #808080; font-size: 14px;"></span>
                </div>
                <button id="confirmMintButton" onclick="confirmMint()">Confirm</button>

            </div>
            <div id="parentAddressDisplay" style="display: none; text-align: center; margin-top: 20px;">
                <p style="margin: 5px 0; color: #96ffc8;">Parent Token Address:</p>
                <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px;">
                    <span id="parentAddressText" style="color: #ffffff; word-break: break-all;"></span>
                    <svg onclick="copyParentAddress()" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="cursor: pointer; color: #ffffff;">
                        <rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
                        <path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"></path>
                    </svg>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div id="mintPopupV2" class="mint-popup">
        <button class="close-button" onclick="toggleMintPopupV2()">X</button>
        <h2>Infinite Mint Tokens</h2>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 87%;">
            <div style="flex: 1;">
                <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px;">
                    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center;">
                        <input type="text" class="input-field" id="claimTokenAddress" placeholder="Claim Token Address">
                        <span id="debentureStatus" style="margin-left: 10px;"></span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="number" class="input-field" id="mintAmountV2" placeholder="Enter amount to mint" min="1">
                </div>
                <button id="confirmMintButtonV2" onclick="confirmMintV2()">Confirm</button>
                <div id="mintStatusV2" class="status-message"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div id="fastMintPopup" class="mint-popup">
        <button class="close-button" onclick="toggleFastMintPopup()">X</button>
        <h2>Fast Mint Tokens</h2>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 87%;">
            <div style="flex: 1;">
                <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px;">
                    <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;">
                        <label style="color: #96ffc8;">Select Source Parent Token:</label>
                        <select id="sourceParentSelector" class="input-field" style="width: 100%; padding: 10px;" onchange="updateFastMintPreview()">
                            <option value="">Loading available tokens...</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
                        <input type="number" class="input-field" id="fastMintAmount" placeholder="Enter amount to mint" min="1" style="width: auto;" oninput="updateFastMintPreview()">
                        <span id="fastMintCostPreview" style="color: #808080; font-size: 14px;"></span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <button id="confirmFastMintButton" onclick="confirmFastMint()">Confirm Fast Mint</button>
                <div id="fastMintStatus" class="status-message"></div>
            </div>
            <div id="fastMintPathDisplay" style="display: none; text-align: center; margin-top: 20px;">
                <p style="margin: 5px 0; color: #96ffc8;">Full Chain Path:</p>
                <div id="fastMintPathText" style="color: #ffffff; word-break: break-all; font-size: 12px;"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        async function checkDebentureStatus(address) {
            try {
                const provider = new ethers.providers.Web3Provider(window.ethereum);
                const contract = new ethers.Contract(address, [
                    {
                        "inputs": [],
                        "name": "Debenture",
                        "outputs": [{"internalType": "bool", "name": "", "type": "bool"}],
                        "stateMutability": "view",
                        "type": "function"
                    }
                ], provider);
                
                const isDebenture = await contract.Debenture();
                return isDebenture;
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error checking debenture status:', error);
                return null;
            }
        }

        // Add event listener for claim token address input
        document.getElementById('claimTokenAddress').addEventListener('input', async function(e) {
            const address = e.target.value;
            const debentureStatus = document.getElementById('debentureStatus');
            
            // Clear previous status
            debentureStatus.innerHTML = '';
            debentureStatus.style.color = '';

            if (ethers.utils.isAddress(address)) {
                const isDebenture = await checkDebentureStatus(address);
                if (isDebenture === true) {
                    debentureStatus.innerHTML = '✓ ';
                    debentureStatus.style.fontSize = '24px';
                    debentureStatus.style.color = 'green';
                    debentureStatus.title = 'This token is a debenture';
                } else if (isDebenture === false) {
                    debentureStatus.innerHTML = '❌';
                    debentureStatus.style.color = 'red';
                    debentureStatus.title = 'This token is not a debenture';
                }
            }
        });

        function toggleMintPopupV2() {
            const popup = document.getElementById('mintPopupV2');
            const claimTokenAddress = document.getElementById('claimTokenAddress');
            const mintAmountInput = document.getElementById('mintAmountV2');
            const mintStatus = document.getElementById('mintStatusV2');
            const debentureStatus = document.getElementById('debentureStatus');
            
            popup.classList.toggle('active');
            if (!popup.classList.contains('active')) {
                claimTokenAddress.value = '';
                mintAmountInput.value = '';
                mintStatus.textContent = '';
                debentureStatus.innerHTML = '';
                currentMintToken = null;
                currentMinterType = null;
            }
        }

        // Fast Mint popup functions
        function toggleFastMintPopup() {
            const popup = document.getElementById('fastMintPopup');
            const fastMintAmount = document.getElementById('fastMintAmount');
            const sourceParentSelector = document.getElementById('sourceParentSelector');
            const fastMintStatus = document.getElementById('fastMintStatus');
            const fastMintCostPreview = document.getElementById('fastMintCostPreview');
            const fastMintPathDisplay = document.getElementById('fastMintPathDisplay');
            
            popup.classList.toggle('active');
            if (!popup.classList.contains('active')) {
                fastMintAmount.value = '';
                sourceParentSelector.value = '';
                fastMintStatus.textContent = '';
                fastMintCostPreview.textContent = '';
                fastMintPathDisplay.style.display = 'none';
                currentMintToken = null;
                currentMinterType = null;
            } else if (currentMintToken && (currentMinterType === 'V3' || currentMinterType === 'V4')) {
                // Populate source parent options
                populateSourceParentOptions();
            }
        }

        async function populateSourceParentOptions() {
            const sourceParentSelector = document.getElementById('sourceParentSelector');
            sourceParentSelector.innerHTML = '<option value="">Loading available tokens...</option>';
            
            if (!currentMintToken) return;
            
            try {
                const multiHopContract = new ethers.Contract(MultiHopAddress, MultiHopABI, rpcProvider);
                const sourceParents = [];
                
                // Start with the current token and traverse up the parent chain
                let currentTokenAddress = currentMintToken.address;
                const visitedTokens = new Set(); // Prevent infinite loops
                
                while (currentTokenAddress && !visitedTokens.has(currentTokenAddress)) {
                    visitedTokens.add(currentTokenAddress);
                    
                    try {
                        // First try MultiHop validateToken function
                        const [isValid, parentAddress] = await multiHopContract.validateToken(currentTokenAddress);
                        
                        if (isValid && parentAddress && parentAddress !== ethers.constants.AddressZero) {
                            // Get token info for the parent
                            const tokenData = await fetchTokenData({ address: parentAddress });
                            
                            // Add to source parents list
                            sourceParents.push({
                                address: parentAddress,
                                name: tokenData?.name || 'Unknown Token',
                                symbol: tokenData?.symbol || 'UNKNOWN',
                                type: 'minter'
                            });
                            
                            // Continue with this parent
                            currentTokenAddress = parentAddress;
                        } else {
                            // No more parents found via MultiHop, try direct parent lookup
                            break;
                        }
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error('Error getting parent via MultiHop for token:', currentTokenAddress, error);
                        break;
                    }
                }
                
                // Also try to get the direct parent of the current minter token (could be regular ERC20)
                try {
                    let parentAddress;
                    if (currentMinterType === 'V3') {
                        const v3Contract = new ethers.Contract(currentMintToken.address, V3Minterabi2, rpcProvider);
                        parentAddress = await v3Contract.Parent();
                    } else if (currentMinterType === 'V4') {
                        const v4Contract = new ethers.Contract(currentMintToken.address, V4MinterABI2, rpcProvider);
                        parentAddress = await v4Contract.Parent();
                    }
                    
                    if (parentAddress && parentAddress !== ethers.constants.AddressZero) {
                        // Check if this parent is already in our list
                        const alreadyExists = sourceParents.some(parent => 
                            parent.address.toLowerCase() === parentAddress.toLowerCase()
                        );
                        
                        if (!alreadyExists) {
                            // Get token info for the direct parent (could be regular ERC20)
                            const tokenData = await fetchTokenData({ address: parentAddress });
                            
                            // Add to source parents list
                            sourceParents.push({
                                address: parentAddress,
                                name: tokenData?.name || 'Unknown Token',
                                symbol: tokenData?.symbol || 'UNKNOWN',
                                type: 'erc20'
                            });
                        }
                    }
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error('Error getting direct parent for token:', currentMintToken.address, error);
                }
                
                // Clear loading message and populate options
                sourceParentSelector.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select source parent...</option>';
                
                if (sourceParents.length === 0) {
                    const option = document.createElement('option');
                    option.value = '';
                    option.textContent = 'No parent tokens found';
                    option.disabled = true;
                    sourceParentSelector.appendChild(option);
                } else {
                    // Display in reverse order
                    for (const parent of sourceParents.slice().reverse()) {
                        const option = document.createElement('option');
                        option.value = parent.address;
                        option.textContent = `${parent.name} (${parent.symbol})${parent.type === 'erc20' ? ' [ERC20]' : ''}`;
                        sourceParentSelector.appendChild(option);
                    }
                }
                
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error populating source parent options:', error);
                sourceParentSelector.innerHTML = '<option value="">Error loading tokens</option>';
            }
        }

        async function updateFastMintPreview() {
            const fastMintAmount = document.getElementById('fastMintAmount').value;
            const sourceParentAddress = document.getElementById('sourceParentSelector').value;
            const fastMintCostPreview = document.getElementById('fastMintCostPreview');
            const fastMintPathDisplay = document.getElementById('fastMintPathDisplay');
            const fastMintPathText = document.getElementById('fastMintPathText');
            
            if (!fastMintAmount || !sourceParentAddress || !currentMintToken) {
                fastMintCostPreview.textContent = '';
                fastMintPathDisplay.style.display = 'none';
                return;
            }
            
            // Show calculating message before starting the calculation
            fastMintCostPreview.textContent = 'Calculating... (10 - 30 Seconds)';
            
            try {
                // Build the complete chain path from source to target
                const fullChainPath = await buildFullChainPath(sourceParentAddress, currentMintToken.address);
                
                // Show the path
                fastMintPathText.textContent = JSON.stringify(fullChainPath);
                fastMintPathDisplay.style.display = 'block';
                
                // Check if source is a regular ERC20 (last parent without multiplier)
                const multiHopContract = new ethers.Contract(MultiHopAddress, MultiHopABI, rpcProvider);
                const targetAmount = ethers.utils.parseEther(fastMintAmount);
                
                // Validate target amount to prevent overflow
                const maxSafeAmount = ethers.utils.parseEther('1000000000'); // 1 billion tokens max
                if (targetAmount.gt(maxSafeAmount)) {
                    fastMintCostPreview.textContent = 'Error: Amount too large, please use a smaller amount';
                    return;
                }
                
                try {
                    // Try the normal MultiHop preview first
                    console.log('Attempting MultiHop preview with:', {
                        targetAmount: targetAmount.toString(),
                        fullChainPath: fullChainPath,
                        pathLength: fullChainPath.length
                    });
                    
                    const [sourceCost, steps] = await multiHopContract.previewMultiHopMintOptimized(targetAmount, fullChainPath);
                    const sourceCostFormatted = ethers.utils.formatEther(sourceCost);
                    fastMintCostPreview.textContent = `Cost: ${parseFloat(sourceCostFormatted).toFixed(6)} source tokens`;
                } catch (previewError) {
                    console.error('Preview error details:', previewError);
                    
                    // Handle different types of errors
                    if (previewError.errorName === 'InvalidToken' || 
                        previewError.errorName === 'Panic' || 
                        previewError.code === 'CALL_EXCEPTION' ||
                        (previewError.errorArgs && previewError.errorArgs[0] && previewError.errorArgs[0].toString() === '17')) {
                        
                        console.log('Falling back to manual calculation due to:', previewError.errorName || 'Panic code 17');
                        const sourceCost = await calculateManualSourceCost(sourceParentAddress, currentMintToken.address, targetAmount);
                        if (sourceCost) {
                            const sourceCostFormatted = ethers.utils.formatEther(sourceCost);
                            fastMintCostPreview.textContent = `Cost: ${parseFloat(sourceCostFormatted).toFixed(6)} source tokens`;
                        } else {
                            fastMintCostPreview.textContent = 'Error calculating cost';
                        }
                    } else {
                        throw previewError; // Re-throw if it's a different error
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error previewing fast mint:', error);
                fastMintCostPreview.textContent = 'Error calculating cost';
            }
        }

        async function calculateManualSourceCost(sourceAddress, targetAddress, targetAmount) {
            try {
                const multiHopContract = new ethers.Contract(MultiHopAddress, MultiHopABI, rpcProvider);
                
                // Build the minter-only chain (excluding the regular ERC20 source)
                const minterChain = [];
                let currentToken = targetAddress;
                const visitedTokens = new Set();
                
                // Traverse from target up to the first minter token
                while (currentToken && !visitedTokens.has(currentToken)) {
                    visitedTokens.add(currentToken);
                    minterChain.push(currentToken);
                    
                    try {
                        const [isValid, parentAddress] = await multiHopContract.validateToken(currentToken);
                        
                        if (isValid && parentAddress && parentAddress !== ethers.constants.AddressZero) {
                            currentToken = parentAddress;
                            
                            // Stop if we've reached the source (which should be the regular ERC20)
                            if (parentAddress.toLowerCase() === sourceAddress.toLowerCase()) {
                                break;
                            }
                        } else {
                            break;
                        }
                    } catch (error) {
                        break;
                    }
                }
                
                // If we have a minter chain, calculate cumulative multiplier effect
                if (minterChain.length > 0) {
                    // Determine the correct minter ABI based on the current minter type
                    let minterABI;
                    if (currentMinterType === 'V3') {
                        minterABI = V3Minterabi2;
                    } else if (currentMinterType === 'V4') {
                        minterABI = V4MinterABI2;
                    } else {
                        return null;
                    }
                    
                    // Calculate cumulative multiplier by working backwards through the chain
                    let requiredAmount = targetAmount;
                    
                    // Process each minter in the chain from target to source
                    for (let i = 0; i < minterChain.length; i++) {
                        const minterAddress = minterChain[i];
                        
                        try {
                            const minterContract = new ethers.Contract(minterAddress, minterABI, rpcProvider);
                            const multiplier = await minterContract.Multiplier(1);
                            
                            // To get requiredAmount of this minter token, we need requiredAmount * multiplier of its parent
                            // Check for potential overflow before multiplication
                            const maxSafeMultiplier = ethers.constants.MaxUint256.div(requiredAmount);
                            if (multiplier.gt(maxSafeMultiplier)) {
                                console.error(`Multiplier ${multiplier.toString()} too large, would cause overflow`);
                                return null;
                            }
                            
                            requiredAmount = requiredAmount.mul(multiplier);
                            
                            console.log(`Minter ${minterAddress}: multiplier = ${multiplier.toString()}, required parent amount = ${ethers.utils.formatEther(requiredAmount)}`);
                        } catch (error) {
                            console.error(`Error getting multiplier for minter ${minterAddress}:`, error);
                            // If we can't get multiplier for any minter in the chain, fall back to simple calculation
                            // Use only the last minter's multiplier (the one closest to source)
                            if (i === minterChain.length - 1) {
                                try {
                                    const fallbackContract = new ethers.Contract(minterAddress, minterABI, rpcProvider);
                                    const fallbackMultiplier = await fallbackContract.Multiplier(1);
                                    return targetAmount.mul(fallbackMultiplier);
                                } catch (fallbackError) {
                                    console.error('Fallback multiplier calculation also failed:', fallbackError);
                                    return null;
                                }
                            }
                            return null;
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // requiredAmount now contains the total amount of source tokens needed
                    console.log(`Total source tokens required: ${ethers.utils.formatEther(requiredAmount)}`);
                    return requiredAmount;
                }
                
                return null;
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error calculating manual source cost:', error);
                return null;
            }
        }

        async function performDirectMintFromERC20(sourceAddress, targetAddress, targetAmount, signer) {
            try {
                // For regular ERC20 sources, we need to mint the target token directly
                // This assumes the target token is a minter token that accepts the ERC20 as parent
                
                // Determine the correct minter ABI based on the current minter type
                let minterABI;
                if (currentMinterType === 'V3') {
                    minterABI = [
                        {
                            "name": "mint",
                            "type": "function",
                            "inputs": [
                                {
                                    "name": "amount",
                                    "type": "uint256",
                                    "internalType": "uint256"
                                }
                            ],
                            "outputs": [
                                {
                                    "name": "",
                                    "type": "bool",
                                    "internalType": "bool"
                                }
                            ],
                            "selector": "0xa0712d68",
                            "signature": "mint(uint256)",
                            "stateMutability": "nonpayable"
                        }
                    ];
                } else if (currentMinterType === 'V4') {
                    minterABI = [
                        {
                            "name": "mint",
                            "type": "function",
                            "inputs": [
                                {
                                    "name": "amount",
                                    "type": "uint256",
                                    "internalType": "uint256"
                                }
                            ],
                            "outputs": [],
                            "stateMutability": "nonpayable"
                        }
                    ];
                } else {
                    throw new Error('Unsupported minter type for direct ERC20 minting');
                }
                
                // Create contract instance and call mint
                const minterContract = new ethers.Contract(targetAddress, minterABI, signer);
                const tx = await minterContract.mint(targetAmount);
                
                return tx;
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error performing direct mint from ERC20:', error);
                throw error;
            }
        }

        async function buildFullChainPath(sourceAddress, targetAddress) {
            const multiHopContract = new ethers.Contract(MultiHopAddress, MultiHopABI, rpcProvider);
            
            // Validate input addresses
            if (!sourceAddress || !targetAddress) {
                console.error('Invalid addresses provided to buildFullChainPath');
                return [sourceAddress, targetAddress];
            }
            
            // Build path from target back to source, then reverse it
            const pathFromTarget = [];
            let currentToken = targetAddress;
            const visitedTokens = new Set();
            let maxIterations = 10; // Prevent infinite loops
            let iterationCount = 0;
            
            // Traverse from target up to source (or root)
            while (currentToken && !visitedTokens.has(currentToken) && iterationCount < maxIterations) {
                iterationCount++;
                visitedTokens.add(currentToken);
                pathFromTarget.push(currentToken);
                
                try {
                    const [isValid, parentAddress] = await multiHopContract.validateToken(currentToken);
                    
                    if (isValid && parentAddress && parentAddress !== ethers.constants.AddressZero) {
                        currentToken = parentAddress;
                        
                        // If we've reached the selected source, stop here
                        if (parentAddress.toLowerCase() === sourceAddress.toLowerCase()) {
                            pathFromTarget.push(parentAddress);
                            break;
                        }
                    } else {
                        break;
                    }
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error('Error building chain path:', error);
                    break;
                }
            }
            
            // Reverse the path so it goes from source to target
            const fullChainPath = pathFromTarget.reverse();
            
            // Validate the final path
            if (fullChainPath.length === 0) {
                console.warn('Empty chain path generated, using direct path');
                return [sourceAddress, targetAddress];
            }
            
            // Ensure the path starts with the selected source
            if (fullChainPath[0].toLowerCase() !== sourceAddress.toLowerCase()) {
                console.warn('Chain path does not start with source, using direct path');
                return [sourceAddress, targetAddress];
            }
            
            // Ensure the path ends with the target
            if (fullChainPath[fullChainPath.length - 1].toLowerCase() !== targetAddress.toLowerCase()) {
                console.warn('Chain path does not end with target, using direct path');
                return [sourceAddress, targetAddress];
            }
            
            console.log('Built chain path:', fullChainPath);
            return fullChainPath;
        }

        async function confirmFastMint() {
            const fastMintAmount = document.getElementById('fastMintAmount').value;
            const sourceParentAddress = document.getElementById('sourceParentSelector').value;
            const fastMintStatus = document.getElementById('fastMintStatus');
            const confirmButton = document.getElementById('confirmFastMintButton');
            
            if (!fastMintAmount || !sourceParentAddress || !currentMintToken) {
                fastMintStatus.textContent = 'Please fill in all fields';
                fastMintStatus.style.color = '#ff6666';
                return;
            }
            
            try {
                confirmButton.disabled = true;
                fastMintStatus.textContent = 'Processing fast mint...';
                fastMintStatus.style.color = '#ffffff';
                
                const provider = new ethers.providers.Web3Provider(window.ethereum);
                const signer = provider.getSigner();
                const multiHopContract = new ethers.Contract(MultiHopAddress, MultiHopABI, signer);
                
                const targetAmount = ethers.utils.parseEther(fastMintAmount);
                const fullChainPath = await buildFullChainPath(sourceParentAddress, currentMintToken.address);
                
                // Get the source cost first
                fastMintStatus.textContent = 'Calculating required source tokens...';
                let sourceCost;
                
                try {
                    [sourceCost] = await multiHopContract.previewMultiHopMintOptimized(targetAmount, fullChainPath);
                } catch (previewError) {
                    console.error('Preview error details:', previewError);
                    
                    // Handle different types of errors including panic code 17
                    if (previewError.errorName === 'InvalidToken' || 
                        previewError.errorName === 'Panic' || 
                        previewError.code === 'CALL_EXCEPTION' ||
                        (previewError.errorArgs && previewError.errorArgs[0] && previewError.errorArgs[0].toString() === '17')) {
                        
                        console.log('Falling back to manual calculation due to:', previewError.errorName || 'Panic code 17');
                        fastMintStatus.textContent = 'Source is regular ERC20, calculating manually...';
                        sourceCost = await calculateManualSourceCost(sourceParentAddress, currentMintToken.address, targetAmount);
                        
                        if (!sourceCost) {
                            fastMintStatus.textContent = 'Error: Cannot calculate cost for this token combination';
                            fastMintStatus.style.color = '#ff6666';
                            confirmButton.disabled = false;
                            return;
                        }
                    } else {
                        throw previewError; // Re-throw if it's a different error
                    }
                }
                
                // Check if user has enough source tokens
                fastMintStatus.textContent = 'Checking source token balance...';
                const sourceTokenContract = new ethers.Contract(sourceParentAddress, [
                    "function balanceOf(address) view returns (uint256)",
                    "function allowance(address,address) view returns (uint256)",
                    "function approve(address,uint256) returns (bool)"
                ], provider);
                
                const userBalance = await sourceTokenContract.balanceOf(connectedWalletAddress);
                if (userBalance.lt(sourceCost)) {
                    fastMintStatus.textContent = 'Insufficient source token balance';
                    fastMintStatus.style.color = '#ff6666';
                    confirmButton.disabled = false;
                    return;
                }
                
                // Check allowance and approve infinite if needed (similar to regular mint)
                fastMintStatus.textContent = 'Checking allowance...';
                const currentAllowance = await sourceTokenContract.allowance(connectedWalletAddress, MultiHopAddress);
                const sufficientAllowance = currentAllowance.gte(sourceCost);
                
                if (!sufficientAllowance) {
                    fastMintStatus.textContent = 'Initiating approval for infinite allowance...';
                    const sourceTokenContractWithSigner = new ethers.Contract(sourceParentAddress, [
                        "function balanceOf(address) view returns (uint256)",
                        "function allowance(address,address) view returns (uint256)",
                        "function approve(address,uint256) returns (bool)"
                    ], signer);
                    
                    const approveTx = await sourceTokenContractWithSigner.approve(MultiHopAddress, ethers.constants.MaxUint256);
                    fastMintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for approval confirmation...';
                    await approveTx.wait();
                    fastMintStatus.textContent = 'Approval confirmed! Initiating fast mint...';
                } else {
                    fastMintStatus.textContent = 'Sufficient allowance detected. Initiating fast mint...';
                }
                
                // Execute the fast mint
                fastMintStatus.textContent = 'Executing fast mint...';
                let tx;
                
                try {
                    tx = await multiHopContract.multiHopMintOptimized(targetAmount, fullChainPath);
                } catch (mintError) {
                    // If MultiHop mint fails with InvalidToken, do direct mint for regular ERC20 source
                    if (mintError.errorName === 'InvalidToken') {
                        fastMintStatus.textContent = 'Using direct mint for regular ERC20 source...';
                        tx = await performDirectMintFromERC20(sourceParentAddress, currentMintToken.address, targetAmount, signer);
                    } else {
                        throw mintError; // Re-throw if it's a different error
                    }
                }
                
                fastMintStatus.textContent = 'Transaction submitted. Waiting for confirmation...';
                const receipt = await tx.wait();
                
                fastMintStatus.textContent = `Fast mint successful! TX: ${receipt.transactionHash}`;
                fastMintStatus.style.color = '#00ff00';
                
                // Show notification for successful fast mint
                const tokenData = await fetchTokenData(currentMintToken);
                const tokenName = tokenData.name || 'Unknown Token';
                const notification = document.createElement('div');
                notification.className = 'notification';
                notification.textContent = `Successfully fast minted ${fastMintAmount} ${tokenName}`;
                document.body.appendChild(notification);
                setTimeout(() => {
                    notification.classList.add('show');
                }, 100);
                setTimeout(() => {
                    notification.classList.remove('show');
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        notification.remove();
                    }, 300);
                }, 3000);
                
                // Close popup after 3 seconds
                setTimeout(() => {
                    toggleFastMintPopup();
                }, 3000);
                
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Fast mint error:', error);
                fastMintStatus.textContent = `Error: ${error.message || 'Fast mint failed'}`;
                fastMintStatus.style.color = '#ff6666';
            } finally {
                confirmButton.disabled = false;
            }
        }

        
    </script>

     <div id="howItWorksPopup" class="how-it-works-popup" style="display: none;">
        <div class="proposal-popup-overlay" onclick="closeHowItWorksPopup()"></div>
        <div class="proposal-popup-content">
            <button class="close-button" onclick="closeHowItWorksPopup()">×</button>
            <h2 class="how-it-works-title">How It Works</h2>
            <div class="voting-contract-section">
                <div class="contract-info">
                    <span class="contract-label">Voting contract : </span>
                    <span class="contract-address">0xa333561A5e08c002c083E3798DC8D504A262c9Ef</span>
                </div>
                <div class="contract-info">
                    <span class="contract-label">ABI to vote : </span>
                    <span class="copy-icon abi-copy-icon" onclick="copyVotingABI()" title="Copy ABI">
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                            <rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
                            <path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"></path>
                        </svg>
                        <span class="copy-tooltip">Copy ABI</span>
                    </span>
                </div>
                <div class="contract-info">
                    <span class="contract-label">25 Crow Holder Count : </span>
                    <span class="crow-count">10</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="how-it-works-content">
                <div class="how-it-works-section">
                    <h3>Proposal Submission</h3>
                    <p>Community members can submit logo proposals for any V1 through V4 minter token apart of the "System Tokens" box by providing:</p>
                    <ul>
                        <li>Valid token contract address</li>
                        <li>High-quality logo image (PNG, JPG, GIF up to 5MB)</li>
                        <li>Can only upload Logo proposals through the front end</li>
                        <li>Make sure the proposed token is from the "System Tokens" box</li>
                        <li>Make Sure you have signed login message when first connecting to site for logo icon functionality</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
                
                <div class="how-it-works-section">
                    <h3>Voting Process</h3>
                    <p>Once submitted, proposals enter the voting phase where:</p>
                    <ul>
                        <li>Holders of 25 crow tokens can vote YES or NO on each proposal</li>
                        <li>Each wallet can vote once per proposal</li>
                        <li>If half of the total number wallets holding 25 crows tokens vote YES, then the proposal is approved</li>
                        <li>If Half of the total number of wallet holding 25 crows tokens vote NO, then the proposal is rejected</li>
                        <li>If there is a Tie betweem YES and NO votes, then the proposal is rejected</li>
                        <li>Vote counts are displayed in real-time</li>
                        <li>If a address is currentlty active and awaiting approval, that proposal has to end before that address can be submitted for approval again</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
                
                <div class="how-it-works-section">
                    <h3>Approval & Implementation</h3>
                    <p>Successful proposals are moved to the "Approved" tab where:</p>
                    <ul>
                        <li>Approved logos become the official token representation</li>
                        <li>The community can view all approved proposals</li>
                        <li>Proposals with sufficient votes are automatically approved</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>

                <div class="how-it-works-section">
                    <h3>How to Vote Manually</h3>
                    <ul>
                        <li>Call getActiveProposals() to get the current active proposals, the proposal ID's will be displayed in order</li>
                        <li>Call GetProposal(proposalID) to get the details of the proposal, can only view Logos on the front end</li>
                        <li>Call Vote(proposalID, true) to vote yes, or Vote(proposalID, false) to vote no</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            
                
                <div class="how-it-works-section">
                    <h3>Community Guidelines</h3>
                    <p>To ensure quality submissions:</p>
                    <ul>
                        <li>Ensure images are clear and appropriately sized</li>
                        <li>Verify token addresses before submission</li>
                        <li>Vote responsibly on community proposals, votes are final and cannot be changed</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
                <div class="how-it-works-section">
                    <h3>Bonus</h3>
                    <p>Certain whitelisted addresses can submit proposals with Title and Description</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

        // How It Works popup functions
function openHowItWorksPopup() {
    const popup = document.getElementById('howItWorksPopup');
    popup.style.display = 'flex';
    setTimeout(() => {
        popup.classList.add('active');
    }, 10);
}

function closeHowItWorksPopup() {
    const popup = document.getElementById('howItWorksPopup');
    popup.classList.remove('active');
    setTimeout(() => {
        popup.style.display = 'none';
    }, 300);
}

function copyVotingABI() {
    const votingABI = `[
  {
    "inputs": [],
    "name": "getActiveProposals",
    "outputs": [
      {
        "internalType": "uint256[]",
        "name": "",
        "type": "uint256[]"
      }
    ],
    "stateMutability": "view",
    "type": "function"
  },
  {
    "inputs": [],
    "name": "getApprovedProposals",
    "outputs": [
      {
        "internalType": "uint256[]",
        "name": "",
        "type": "uint256[]"
      }
    ],
    "stateMutability": "view",
    "type": "function"
  },
  {
    "inputs": [],
    "name": "proposalCounter",
    "outputs": [
      {
        "internalType": "uint256",
        "name": "",
        "type": "uint256"
      }
    ],
    "stateMutability": "view",
    "type": "function"
  },
  {
    "inputs": [
      {
        "internalType": "uint256",
        "name": "_proposalId",
        "type": "uint256"
      }
    ],
    "name": "getProposal",
    "outputs": [
      {
        "internalType": "uint256",
        "name": "id",
        "type": "uint256"
      },

async function saveImportedTokensToFirebase(walletAddress, tokens) {
    if (!window.db || !walletAddress) {
        console.error('Firebase not initialized or no wallet address');
        return false;
    }

    try {
        const docRef = window.db.collection('imported_tokens').doc(walletAddress.toLowerCase());
        await docRef.set({
            walletAddress: walletAddress.toLowerCase(),
            tokens: tokens,
            lastUpdated: firebase.firestore.Timestamp.now()
        });
        console.log('Imported tokens saved to Firebase successfully');
        return true;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error saving imported tokens to Firebase:', error);
        return false;
    }
}

if (window.db && connectedWalletAddress) {
    deleteImportedTokenFromFirebase(connectedWalletAddress, token.address).catch(error => {
        console.warn('Failed to delete from Firebase, but deleted locally:', error);
    });
}


async function loadImportedTokensFromFirebase(walletAddress) {
    if (!window.db || !walletAddress) {
        console.error('Firebase not initialized or no wallet address');
        return [];
    }

    try {
        const docRef = window.db.collection('imported_tokens').doc(walletAddress.toLowerCase());
        const doc = await docRef.get();
        
        if (doc.exists) {
            const data = doc.data();
            return data.tokens || [];
        }
        return [];
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error loading imported tokens from Firebase:', error);
        return [];
    }
}

async function deleteImportedTokenFromFirebase(walletAddress, tokenAddress) {
    if (!window.db || !walletAddress) {
        console.error('Firebase not initialized or no wallet address');
        return false;
    }

    try {
        const tokens = await loadImportedTokensFromFirebase(walletAddress);
        const updatedTokens = tokens.filter(t => t && t.address && typeof t.address === 'string' && t.address.toLowerCase() !== tokenAddress.toLowerCase());
        return await saveImportedTokensToFirebase(walletAddress, updatedTokens);
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error deleting imported token from Firebase:', error);
        return false;
    }
}

function selectCommunityOption(view, displayText) {
    // Update dropdown text
    document.getElementById('communityDropdownText').textContent = displayText;

    document.querySelectorAll('.community-dropdown-item').forEach(item => {
        item.classList.remove('active');
    });

    // Close dropdown
    document.getElementById('communityDropdownMenu').classList.remove('show');

// Load Firebase scripts using the v8 compat version with proper sequential loading
function loadFirebaseScripts() {
  const firebaseScript = document.createElement('script');
  firebaseScript.src = 'https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/8.10.1/firebase-app.js';
  
  firebaseScript.onload = function() {
    console.log('Firebase app loaded');
    
    // Load Firestore after app is loaded
    const firestoreScript = document.createElement('script');
    firestoreScript.src = 'https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/8.10.1/firebase-firestore.js';
    
    firestoreScript.onload = function() {
      console.log('Firebase firestore loaded');
      
      // Load Auth after Firestore is loaded
      const authScript = document.createElement('script');
      authScript.src = 'https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/8.10.1/firebase-auth.js';
      
      authScript.onload = function() {
        console.log('Firebase auth loaded');
        
        // Load Analytics after Auth is loaded
        const analyticsScript = document.createElement('script');
        analyticsScript.src = 'https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/8.10.1/firebase-analytics.js';
        
        analyticsScript.onload = function() {
          console.log('Firebase analytics loaded');
          // All scripts loaded, now initialize Firebase
          initializeFirebase();
        };
        
        analyticsScript.onerror = function() {
          console.error('Failed to load Firebase analytics');
          // Initialize without analytics if it fails
          initializeFirebase();
        };
        
        document.head.appendChild(analyticsScript);
      };
      
      authScript.onerror = function() {
        console.error('Failed to load Firebase auth');
      };
      
      document.head.appendChild(authScript);
    };
    
    firestoreScript.onerror = function() {
      console.error('Failed to load Firebase firestore');
    };
    
    document.head.appendChild(firestoreScript);
  };
  
  firebaseScript.onerror = function() {
    console.error('Failed to load Firebase app');
  };
  
  document.head.appendChild(firebaseScript);
}

// Start loading Firebase scripts
loadFirebaseScripts();

async function displayCommunitySpines(spines) {
    const v2SpinesList = document.getElementById('communityV2SpinesList');
    
    // Safety check - if element doesn't exist, retry after a short delay
    if (!v2SpinesList) {
        console.log('Community spines list element not found, retrying in 200ms...');
        setTimeout(() => displayCommunitySpines(spines), 200);
        return;
    }
    
    if (!spines || spines.length === 0) {
        v2SpinesList.innerHTML = '<div style="padding: 20px; text-align: center;">No community spines yet. Be the first to share!</div>';
        return;
    }

    v2SpinesList.innerHTML = spines.map((spine, spineIndex) => {
        const isOwner = connectedWalletAddress && spine.walletAddress.toLowerCase() === connectedWalletAddress.toLowerCase();
        
        // Handle timestamp conversion
        let timestamp;
        if (spine.timestamp && spine.timestamp.toDate) {
            timestamp = spine.timestamp.toDate().toLocaleString();
        } else if (spine.timestamp) {
            timestamp = new Date(spine.timestamp).toLocaleString();
        } else {
            timestamp = 'Unknown time';
        }
        
        return `
            <div class="community-spine-item">
                <div class="spine-header">
                    <div class="spine-owner">
                        Owner: ${spine.walletAddress.slice(0, 6)}...${spine.walletAddress.slice(-4)}

                        <div class="spine-timestamp">${timestamp}</div>
                        ${isOwner ? `<button class="delete-spine-btn" onclick="deleteSpine('${spine.id}')">Delete</button>` : ''}
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="spine-toggle" onclick="toggleSpineTokens(${spineIndex})">
                    <div class="spine-toggle-info">
                        <strong>Tokens in Spine: ${spine.tokens.length}</strong>
                    </div>
                    <div class="spine-toggle-arrow" id="arrow-${spineIndex}">▼</div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="spine-tokens collapsed" id="tokens-${spineIndex}">
                    ${spine.tokens.map((token, index) => `
                        <div class="spine-token">
                            <div class="spine-token-info">
                                <strong>${token.symbol}</strong> - ${token.name}
                                <br><small>${token.address}</small>
                                ${token.parentAddress ? `<br><small>Parent: ${token.parentAddress}</small>` : ''}
                            </div>
                            <div class="spine-token-price" id="price-${spineIndex}-${index}" style="margin: 8px 0; font-size: 18px; color: #808080; text-align: left;">
                                Price: Loading...
                            </div>
                            ${token.parentAddress ? `
                                <button class="spine-infinite-mint-btn" onclick="openSpineInfiniteMint('${token.address}', '${token.parentAddress}', '${token.symbol}', '${token.name}')" title="Infinite Mint ${token.symbol}">
                                    Infinite Mint
                                </button>
                            ` : ''}
                        </div>
                    `).join('')}
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
    }).join('');

    // Calculate prices for all community spine tokens after they're loaded
    await calculateCommunitySpinePrices(spines);
}

// New function to calculate prices for community spine tokens
async function calculateCommunitySpinePrices(spines) {
    // Ensure PLS price is available
    if (!plsPrice) {
        await fetchPlsPrice();
    }

    // **KEY CHANGE: Process all tokens in parallel instead of sequentially**
    const pricePromises = [];
    
    for (let spineIndex = 0; spineIndex < spines.length; spineIndex++) {
        const spine = spines[spineIndex];
        
        for (let tokenIndex = 0; tokenIndex < spine.tokens.length; tokenIndex++) {
            const token = spine.tokens[tokenIndex];
            const priceElement = document.getElementById(`price-${spineIndex}-${tokenIndex}`);
            
            if (!priceElement) continue;

            // Create a promise for each token price calculation
            const pricePromise = (async () => {
                try {
                    // Use stored LP address if available, otherwise fetch it
                    let lpAddress = token.lpAddress;
                    if (!lpAddress) {
                        lpAddress = await getPairAddress(token.address);
                    }

                    // Create token object for fetchTokenData function
                    const tokenForPricing = {
                        address: token.address,
                        name: token.name,
                        symbol: token.symbol,
                        lpAddress: lpAddress
                    };

                    // Use the existing fetchTokenData function to calculate price
                    const tokenData = await fetchTokenData(tokenForPricing);
                    
                    if (tokenData && tokenData.price) {
                        const formattedPrice = parseFloat(tokenData.price).toFixed(13);
                        priceElement.innerHTML = `<span style="color: #808080;">Price: </span><span style="color: #b3ffcc;">$${formattedPrice} (USD)</span>`;
                    } else {
                        priceElement.innerHTML = '<span style="color: #808080;">Price: Unavailable</span>';
                    }
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error(`Error calculating price for ${token.symbol}:`, error);
                    priceElement.textContent = 'Price: Error';
                    priceElement.style.color = '#ff6666';
                }
            })();
            
            pricePromises.push(pricePromise);
        }
    }
    
    // **KEY CHANGE: Wait for all price calculations to complete in parallel**
    await Promise.all(pricePromises);
}



   // Add these authentication functions:

// Update your existing authenticateWithWallet function to include wallet storage
async function authenticateWithWallet(walletAddress) {
    if (!window.auth) {
        console.error('Firebase Auth not initialized');
        return false;
    }

    try {
        // Check if already authenticated for this wallet
        const currentUser = window.auth.currentUser;
        if (currentUser) {
            const storedWallet = localStorage.getItem(`firebase_auth_wallet_${currentUser.uid}`);
            if (storedWallet && storedWallet.toLowerCase() === walletAddress.toLowerCase()) {
                console.log('Already authenticated for this wallet');
                return true;
            }
        }

        // Sign in anonymously first
        const userCredential = await window.auth.signInAnonymously();
        const user = userCredential.user;
        
        // Store the wallet address association
        localStorage.setItem(`firebase_auth_wallet_${user.uid}`, walletAddress.toLowerCase());
        
        // Create a message to sign for verification
        const message = `Authenticate Treasury System access for wallet: ${walletAddress}\nTimestamp: ${Date.now()}`;
        
        // Request signature from user
        const signature = await window.ethereum.request({
            method: 'personal_sign',
            params: [message, walletAddress]
        });
        
        // Store the signature for future reference (optional)
        localStorage.setItem(`treasury_signature_${walletAddress.toLowerCase()}`, signature);
        
        console.log('Wallet authentication successful');
        return true;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error authenticating with wallet:', error);
        return false;
    }
}

async function requestWalletSignature(message) {
  try {
    if (!window.ethereum) {
      throw new Error('No wallet found');
    }

    // Request signature using personal_sign
    const signature = await window.ethereum.request({
      method: 'personal_sign',
      params: [message, connectedWalletAddress]
    });

    return signature;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Signature request failed:', error);
    return null;
  }
}

// Check if user is authenticated
function isAuthenticated() {
  return window.auth && window.auth.currentUser;
}

// Sign out function
async function signOutUser() {
  if (window.auth && window.auth.currentUser) {
    await window.auth.signOut();
    console.log('User signed out');
  }
}

        // Web3 setup for LP pair lookup
        const web3 = new Web3("https://rpc.pulsechain.com/");
        const factoryAddress = "0x29eA7545DEf87022BAdc76323F373EA1e707C523";
        const factoryAbi = [
            {
                "constant": true,
                "inputs": [
                    {"name": "token0", "type": "address"},
                    {"name": "token1", "type": "address"}
                ],
                "name": "getPair",
                "outputs": [{"name": "pair", "type": "address"}],
                "type": "function"
            }
        ];
        const factoryContract = new web3.eth.Contract(factoryAbi, factoryAddress);

        // Function to get pair address
        async function getPairAddress(tokenAddress) {
            try {
                // Try both token orders: WPLS/Token and Token/WPLS
                let pairAddress = await factoryContract.methods.getPair(wplsAddress, tokenAddress).call();
                if (pairAddress === "0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000") {
                    pairAddress = await factoryContract.methods.getPair(tokenAddress, wplsAddress).call();
                }
                return pairAddress === "0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000" ? null : pairAddress;
            } catch (error) {
                console.error(`Error fetching pair for ${tokenAddress}:`, error);
                return null;
            }
        }

        // Matrix background effect
        const canvas = document.getElementById('matrix');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        

        // Set canvas height to 1.3 viewport heights
        canvas.height = Math.max(document.documentElement.scrollHeight, window.innerHeight * 2.1);
canvas.width = window.innerWidth;

        const chars = '01';
        const fontSize = 12;
        const columnSpacing = fontSize * 1.2; // Increased spacing between columns to reduce total number
        let columns = Math.floor(canvas.width / columnSpacing);
        let drops = new Array(columns).fill(0);
        let speeds = new Array(columns).fill(0).map(() => 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.3);
        let lastDrawTime = Date.now(); // Add timestamp for animation state

        const squareSize = 750;
        let squareX = (canvas.width - squareSize) / 2 + 385;
        let squareY = (canvas.height - squareSize) / 2;
        let squareX2 = (canvas.width - squareSize) / 2 - 385;

        function draw() {
            const currentTime = Date.now();
            const deltaTime = currentTime - lastDrawTime;
            lastDrawTime = currentTime;

            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            ctx.font = `${fontSize}px 'Courier New', monospace`;
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';

            for (let i = 0; i < columns; i++) {
                const x = i * columnSpacing;
                const y = drops[i] * fontSize;

                if (!isFinite(x) || !isFinite(y) || x < 0 || x > canvas.width || y < 0) {
                    drops[i] += speeds[i] * (deltaTime / 30); // Scale by deltaTime
                    if (y > canvas.height && Math.random() > 0.99) {
                        drops[i] = 0;
                    }
                    continue;
                }

                const text = chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length));
                const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(x, y - fontSize * 5, x, y);
                gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(150, 255, 200, 0)');
                gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(150, 255, 200, 0.9)');
                ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
                ctx.fillText(text, x, y);

                drops[i] += speeds[i] * (deltaTime / 30); // Scale by deltaTime
                if (y > canvas.height && Math.random() > 0.99) {
                    drops[i] = 0;
                }
            }
        }
