        // Treasury Bill (TBILL) as parent for V1 tokens
        const tbillToken = {
            name: "Treasury Bill",
            address: "0x463413c579D29c26D59a65312657DFCe30D545A1",
            lpAddress: "0x397e2c751915e1221AFdcAf799302881b6EA7001"
        };

        // FED as parent for FDIC in V2
        const fedToken = {
            name: "FED",
            address: "0x1D177CB9EfEEa49A8B97ab1C72785a3A37ABc9Ff",
            lpAddress: "0x333502d557A40FeC45350BeF9c07F9C53244559a"
        };

        let plsPrice = null;
        let tokenDataCache = {};
        let tokenMetadataCache = {}; // Cache for names and symbols only (not prices)
        let importedChildTokens = [];

        // Function to clear metadata cache if needed (e.g., when tokens are updated)
        function clearMetadataCache() {
            tokenMetadataCache = {};
            console.log('Token metadata cache cleared');
        }
        let connectedWalletAddress = null;
        let currentMintToken = null;
        let currentMinterType = null;
        let currentTokenType = 'fdicBar';
        let currentV3TokenType = 'all';
        let currentV4TokenType = 'all';
        let isUpdatingTokenList = false; // Flag to prevent overlapping updates
        let filterStates = {
            v1: 0, // 0: normal, 1: most profitable, 2: highest x's till parity
            v2: 0,
            v3: 0,
            v4: 0
        };

        // Store original token order for each version
        let originalTokenOrder = {
            v1: [],
            v2: [],
            v3: [],
            v4: []
        };

        function toggleFilter(version) {
            const filterButton = document.getElementById(`filterButton${version.toUpperCase()}`);
            const tokenList = document.getElementById(`${version}TokenList`);
            
            // Get all token rows
            const tokenRows = Array.from(tokenList.getElementsByClassName('token-row'));
            
            // Store original order if not already stored
            if (originalTokenOrder[version].length === 0) {
                originalTokenOrder[version] = tokenRows.map(row => row.cloneNode(true));
            }
            
            // Increment filter state
            filterStates[version] = (filterStates[version] + 1) % 3;
            
            // Update button appearance
            filterButton.classList.toggle('active', filterStates[version] !== 0);
            
            // Sort tokens based on filter state
            switch(filterStates[version]) {
                case 1: // Show "Mint for profit" tokens first, then "x's till parity" in ascending order
                    tokenRows.sort((a, b) => {
                        const aText = a.querySelector('.token-profitability').textContent;
                        const bText = b.querySelector('.token-profitability').textContent;
                        
                        // If both are "Mint for profit", sort by multiplier in descending order
                        if (aText.includes('Mint for profit') && bText.includes('Mint for profit')) {
                            const aMultiplier = parseFloat(aText.split('x')[0]) || 0;
                            const bMultiplier = parseFloat(bText.split('x')[0]) || 0;
                            return bMultiplier - aMultiplier;
                        }
                        
                        // If only one is "Mint for profit", prioritize it
                        if (aText.includes('Mint for profit')) return -1;
                        if (bText.includes('Mint for profit')) return 1;
                        
                        // If both are "x's till parity", sort by multiplier in ascending order
                        if (aText.includes('x until parity') && bText.includes('x until parity')) {
                            const aMultiplier = parseFloat(aText.split('x')[0]) || 0;
                            const bMultiplier = parseFloat(bText.split('x')[0]) || 0;
                            return aMultiplier - bMultiplier;
                        }
                        
                        // If only one is "x's till parity", prioritize it
                        if (aText.includes('x until parity')) return -1;
                        if (bText.includes('x until parity')) return 1;
                        
                        // If neither has any special status, keep original order
                        return 0;
                    });
                    break;
                case 2: // Show "x's till parity" tokens in descending order, then "Mint for profit" in ascending order
                    tokenRows.sort((a, b) => {
                        const aText = a.querySelector('.token-profitability').textContent;
                        const bText = b.querySelector('.token-profitability').textContent;
                        
                        // If both are "x's till parity", sort by multiplier in descending order
                        if (aText.includes('x until parity') && bText.includes('x until parity')) {
                            const aMultiplier = parseFloat(aText.split('x')[0]) || 0;
                            const bMultiplier = parseFloat(bText.split('x')[0]) || 0;
                            return bMultiplier - aMultiplier;
                        }
                        
                        // If only one is "x's till parity", prioritize it
                        if (aText.includes('x until parity')) return -1;
                        if (bText.includes('x until parity')) return 1;
                        
                        // If both are "Mint for profit", sort by multiplier in ascending order
                        if (aText.includes('Mint for profit') && bText.includes('Mint for profit')) {
                            const aMultiplier = parseFloat(aText.split('x')[0]) || 0;
                            const bMultiplier = parseFloat(bText.split('x')[0]) || 0;
                            return aMultiplier - bMultiplier;
                        }
                        
                        // If only one is "Mint for profit", prioritize it after "x's till parity"
                        if (aText.includes('Mint for profit')) return -1;
                        if (bText.includes('Mint for profit')) return 1;
                        
                        // If neither has any special status, keep original order
                        return 0;
                    });
                    break;
                default: // Reset to original order
                    // Clear the current list
                    tokenList.innerHTML = '';
                    // Restore original order
                    originalTokenOrder[version].forEach(row => {
                        tokenList.appendChild(row.cloneNode(true));
                    });
                    return; // Exit early since we've already reordered the list
            }
            
            // Reorder the tokens in the DOM
            tokenRows.forEach(row => tokenList.appendChild(row));
        }

        // Search functionality
        let searchStates = {
            v1: false,
            v2: false,
            v3: false,
            v4: false
        };



        function toggleSearch(version) {
            const searchInput = document.getElementById(`searchInput${version.toUpperCase()}`);
            const searchButton = document.getElementById(`searchButton${version.toUpperCase()}`);
            const tokenList = document.getElementById(`tokenList${version.toUpperCase()}`);
            
            searchStates[version] = !searchStates[version];
            
            if (searchStates[version]) {
                searchInput.style.display = 'block';
                searchInput.focus();
                searchButton.style.opacity = '0.7';
                tokenList.classList.add('search-active');
            } else {
                searchInput.style.display = 'none';
                searchInput.value = '';
                searchButton.style.opacity = '1';
                tokenList.classList.remove('search-active');
                // Reset search results
                searchTokens(version, '');
            }
        }

        function searchTokens(version, searchTerm) {
            const tokenList = document.getElementById(`${version}TokenList`);
            const tokenRows = Array.from(tokenList.getElementsByClassName('token-row'));
            
            if (!searchTerm.trim()) {
                // Show all tokens
                tokenRows.forEach(row => {
                    row.style.display = '';
                });
                return;
            }
            
            const searchLower = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
            let matchCount = 0;
            
            tokenRows.forEach(row => {
                const tokenName = getTokenNameFromRow(row).toLowerCase();
                const tokenSymbol = getTokenSymbolFromRow(row).toLowerCase();
                const tokenAddress = getTokenAddressFromRow(row).toLowerCase();
                
                const matches = tokenName.includes(searchLower) || 
                               tokenSymbol.includes(searchLower) ||
                               tokenAddress.includes(searchLower);
                
                if (matches) {
                    matchCount++;
                }
                
                row.style.display = matches ? '' : 'none';
            });
            
            console.log(`Search "${searchTerm}" in ${version.toUpperCase()}: ${matchCount} matches out of ${tokenRows.length} tokens`);
        }

        function getTokenNameFromRow(row) {
            // Extract token name from the actual DOM structure
            const nameElement = row.querySelector('.token-info .name');
            if (nameElement) {
                // Get text content but exclude the copy icon
                const copyIcon = nameElement.querySelector('.copy-icon');
                if (copyIcon) {
                    const clonedElement = nameElement.cloneNode(true);
                    const clonedCopyIcon = clonedElement.querySelector('.copy-icon');
                    if (clonedCopyIcon) {
                        clonedCopyIcon.remove();
                    }
                    return clonedElement.textContent.trim();
                } else {
                    return nameElement.textContent.trim();
                }
            }
            return '';
        }

        function getTokenSymbolFromRow(row) {
            // Extract token symbol from the actual DOM structure
            const symbolElement = row.querySelector('.token-info .symbol');
            if (symbolElement) {
                // Remove parentheses from symbol like "(FDIC)" -> "FDIC"
                return symbolElement.textContent.replace(/[()]/g, '').trim();
            }
            return '';
        }

        function getTokenAddressFromRow(row) {
            // Extract token address from the data attribute
            const address = row.getAttribute('data-token-address');
            if (address) {
                return address;
            }
            
            // Fallback: look for address-like strings in the row
            const allText = row.textContent;
            const addressMatch = allText.match(/0x[a-fA-F0-9]{40}/);
            return addressMatch ? addressMatch[0] : '';
        }

        function toggleFullscreen(overlayId) {
            const overlay = document.querySelector('.overlay2');
            const fullscreenButton = overlay.querySelector('.fullscreen-button');
            
            if (overlay.classList.contains('fullscreen')) {
                // Exit fullscreen
                overlay.classList.remove('fullscreen');
                document.body.classList.remove('fullscreen-active');
                
                // Change icon to fullscreen expand
                fullscreenButton.innerHTML = `
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                        <path d="M7 14H5v5h5v-2H7v-3zm-2-4h2V7h3V5H5v5zm12 7h-3v2h5v-5h-2v3zM14 5v2h3v3h2V5h-5z"/>
                    </svg>
                `;
            } else {
                // Enter fullscreen
                overlay.classList.add('fullscreen');
                document.body.classList.add('fullscreen-active');
                
                // Change icon to fullscreen exit
                fullscreenButton.innerHTML = `
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                        <path d="M5 16h3v3h2v-5H5v2zm3-8H5v2h5V5H8v3zm6 11h2v-3h3v-2h-5v5zm2-11V5h-2v5h5V8h-3z"/>
                    </svg>
                `;
            }
        }

            const dropdownMenu = document.getElementById('systemTokensDropdownMenu');

            dropdownMenu.classList.toggle('show');

        function selectSystemTokensOption(tabId, displayText) {
            // Update dropdown display text
            document.getElementById('systemTokensDropdownText').textContent = displayText;
            
            // Update active states in dropdown
            const dropdownItems = document.querySelectorAll('.system-tokens-dropdown-item');
            dropdownItems.forEach(item => item.classList.remove('active'));
            event.target.classList.add('active');
            
            // Close dropdown
            const dropdownMenu = document.getElementById('systemTokensDropdownMenu');
            const dropdownButton = document.querySelector('.system-tokens-dropdown-button');
            dropdownMenu.classList.remove('show');
            dropdownButton.classList.remove('active');
            
            // Call the existing selectTab function to handle the actual tab switching
            selectTab(tabId);
        }

        // Close dropdown when clicking outside
        document.addEventListener('click', function(event) {
            const dropdown = document.querySelector('.system-tokens-dropdown');
            if (dropdown && !dropdown.contains(event.target)) {
                const dropdownMenu = document.getElementById('systemTokensDropdownMenu');
                const dropdownButton = document.querySelector('.system-tokens-dropdown-button');
                if (dropdownMenu && dropdownButton) {
                    dropdownMenu.classList.remove('show');
                    dropdownButton.classList.remove('active');
                }
            }
        });

        // Handle keyboard events for search
        document.addEventListener('keydown', function(event) {
            if (event.key === 'Escape') {
                // Close any open search inputs
                ['v1', 'v2', 'v3', 'v4'].forEach(version => {
                    if (searchStates[version]) {
                        toggleSearch(version);
                    }
                });
            }
        });

        // Function to load tokens from localStorage
        function loadTokensFromStorage(address) {
            if (!address) return [];
            const storedTokens = localStorage.getItem(`tokens_${address}`);
            if (storedTokens) {
                try {
                    return JSON.parse(storedTokens);
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error('Error parsing stored tokens:', error);
                    return [];
                }
            }
            return [];
        }

        // Function to save tokens to localStorage
        function saveTokensToStorage(address, tokens) {
            if (!address) return;
            try {
                localStorage.setItem(`tokens_${address}`, JSON.stringify(tokens));
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error saving tokens to storage:', error);
            }
        }

        // Function to load spine tokens from localStorage
        function loadSpineTokensFromStorage(address) {
            if (!address) return [];
            const storedTokens = localStorage.getItem(`spine_tokens_${address}`);
            if (storedTokens) {
                try {
                    return JSON.parse(storedTokens);
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error('Error parsing stored spine tokens:', error);
                    return [];
                }
            }
            return [];
        }

        // Function to save spine tokens to localStorage
        function saveSpineTokensToStorage(address, tokens) {
            if (!address) return;
            try {
                localStorage.setItem(`spine_tokens_${address}`, JSON.stringify(tokens));
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error saving spine tokens to storage:', error);
            }
        }

        // Function to add a token to importedChildTokens
        function addImportedToken(token) {
    if (!token || !token.address) {
        console.error('Invalid token data:', token);
        return false;
    }

    // Skip spine tokens
    if (token.isSpineToken) {
        return false;
    }

    // Ensure token address is a string
    if (typeof token.address !== 'string') {
        console.error('Token address must be a string:', token);
        return false;
    }

    // Check if token already exists
    const exists = importedChildTokens.some(t => {
        // Validate existing token
        if (!t || !t.address || typeof t.address !== 'string') {
            console.error('Invalid token in importedChildTokens:', t);
            return false;
        }
        return t.address.toLowerCase() === token.address.toLowerCase();
    });

    if (!exists) {
        // Add timestamp when importing
        token.importedAt = firebase.firestore ? firebase.firestore.Timestamp.now() : new Date();
        
        importedChildTokens.push(token);
        if (connectedWalletAddress) {
            saveTokensToStorage(connectedWalletAddress, importedChildTokens);
            // Save to Firebase
            saveImportedTokensToFirebase(connectedWalletAddress, importedChildTokens);
        }
        return true;
    }
    return false;
}

        // Setup provider and contracts
        const rpcProvider = new ethers.providers.JsonRpcProvider('https://rpc.pulsechain.com');
        const eDAIAddress = '0xefd766ccb38eaf1dfd701853bfce31359239f305';
        const wplsAddress = '0xA1077a294dDE1B09bB078844df40758a5D0f9a27';
        const eDAIPlsPoolAddress = '0xe56043671df55de5cdf8459710433c10324de0ae';

        const eDAIContract = new ethers.Contract(eDAIAddress, [
            "function balanceOf(address owner) view returns (uint256)"
        ], rpcProvider);

        const wplsContract = new ethers.Contract(wplsAddress, [
            "function balanceOf(address owner) view returns (uint256)"
        ], rpcProvider);

        const tbillContract = new ethers.Contract(tbillToken.address, tbillABI, rpcProvider);

        // Fetch PLS price using eDAI/WPLS liquidity pool (no caching)
        async function fetchPlsPrice() {
            try {
                const eDAIBalance = await eDAIContract.balanceOf(eDAIPlsPoolAddress);
                const formattedEDAIBalance = ethers.utils.formatUnits(eDAIBalance, 18);
                console.log(`eDAI Balance in pool: ${formattedEDAIBalance}`);

                const wplsBalance = await wplsContract.balanceOf(eDAIPlsPoolAddress);
                const formattedWPLSBalance = ethers.utils.formatUnits(wplsBalance, 18);
                console.log(`WPLS Balance in pool: ${formattedWPLSBalance}`);

                const eDAItoWPLSRatio = parseFloat(formattedEDAIBalance) / parseFloat(formattedWPLSBalance);
                console.log(`eDAI to WPLS Ratio: ${eDAItoWPLSRatio}`);

                plsPrice = parseFloat(eDAItoWPLSRatio.toFixed(15));
                console.log(`Calculated PLS Price: $${plsPrice}`);

                return plsPrice;
                } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error fetching PLS price from eDAI/WPLS pool:', error);
                return null;
            }
        }

        // Fetch token data (name, symbol, price)
        async function fetchTokenData(token) {
            if (!token || !token.address) {
                console.error('Invalid token data:', token);
                return { name: 'Unknown', symbol: 'N/A', price: null };
            }

            let checksummedAddress;
            try {
                checksummedAddress = ethers.utils.getAddress(token.address);
            } catch (error) {
                console.error(`Invalid address for ${token.name || 'Unknown'} (${token.address}):`, error);
                return { name: token.name || 'Unknown', symbol: 'N/A', price: null };
            }

            // Check if we have cached metadata (name/symbol)
            let name, symbol;
            if (tokenMetadataCache[checksummedAddress]) {
                const cachedMetadata = tokenMetadataCache[checksummedAddress];
                name = cachedMetadata.name;
                symbol = cachedMetadata.symbol;
                console.log(`Using cached metadata for ${name} (${symbol})`);
            } else {
                // Fetch name and symbol from contract
                try {
                    const tokenContract = new ethers.Contract(checksummedAddress, [
                        "function balanceOf(address owner) view returns (uint256)",
                        "function name() view returns (string)",
                        "function symbol() view returns (string)"
                    ], rpcProvider);

                    console.log(`Fetching metadata for ${token.name || 'Unknown'}: ${checksummedAddress}`);
                    name = await tokenContract.name();
                    symbol = await tokenContract.symbol();
                    
                    // Cache the metadata
                    tokenMetadataCache[checksummedAddress] = { name, symbol };
                    console.log(`Cached metadata for ${name} (${symbol})`);
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error(`Error fetching name/symbol for ${token.address}:`, error);
                    name = token.name || 'Unknown';
                    symbol = 'N/A';
                    // Don't cache failed lookups
                }
            }

            // Always fetch fresh price data (never cached)
            let price = null;
            try {
                // Create token contract for balance checking (needed for price calculation)
                const tokenContract = new ethers.Contract(checksummedAddress, [
                    "function balanceOf(address owner) view returns (uint256)",
                    "function name() view returns (string)",
                    "function symbol() view returns (string)"
                ], rpcProvider);

                if (token.lpAddress && token.lpAddress !== "0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000") {
                    try {
                        let checksummedLpAddress;
                        try {
                            checksummedLpAddress = ethers.utils.getAddress(token.lpAddress);
                            console.log(`Checksummed LP address for ${name}: ${checksummedLpAddress}`);
                        } catch (error) {
                            console.error(`Invalid LP address for ${name} (${token.lpAddress}):`, error);
                            return { name, symbol, price: null };
                        }

                        // Special case for abC^n*: use TBILL price directly
                        if (token.address.toLowerCase() === "0x3e8a9d55db391751a381d0c3822f727ea81dbdda") {
                            const tbillData = await fetchTokenData(tbillToken);
                            if (tbillData.price) {
                                price = tbillData.price;
                                console.log(`Price for ${name} (abC^n*) set to TBILL price: $${price}`);
                            }
                        } else {
                            const tokenBalance = await tokenContract.balanceOf(checksummedLpAddress);
                            const formattedTokenBalance = ethers.utils.formatUnits(tokenBalance, 18);
                            console.log(`Token ${name} Balance in LP: ${formattedTokenBalance}`);

                            const wplsBalance = await wplsContract.balanceOf(checksummedLpAddress);
                            const formattedWPLSBalance = ethers.utils.formatUnits(wplsBalance, 18);
                            console.log(`WPLS Balance in LP for ${name}: ${formattedWPLSBalance}`);

                            if (parseFloat(formattedTokenBalance) > 0 && parseFloat(formattedWPLSBalance) > 0) {
                                const tokenToWPLSRatio = parseFloat(formattedWPLSBalance) / parseFloat(formattedTokenBalance);
                                console.log(`Token ${name} to WPLS Ratio: ${tokenToWPLSRatio}`);

                                if (!plsPrice) {
                                    plsPrice = await fetchPlsPrice();
                                    console.log(`PLS Price for ${name}: $${plsPrice}`);
                                }

                                price = plsPrice ? (tokenToWPLSRatio * plsPrice).toFixed(15) : null;
                                console.log(`Calculated Price for ${name}: $${price}`);
                            } else {
                                console.warn(`Invalid balances for ${name} LP pool: Token=${formattedTokenBalance}, WPLS=${formattedWPLSBalance}`);
                            }
                        }
                    } catch (lpError) {
                        console.error(`Error fetching LP data for ${name} (${token.lpAddress}):`, lpError);
                    }
                } else {
                    console.log(`No valid LP address for ${name} (${token.address})`);
                }

                const tokenData = { name, symbol, price };
                // Don't cache the full tokenData since we want fresh prices
                return tokenData;
            } catch (error) {
                console.error(`Error fetching token data for ${token.name || 'Unknown'} (${token.address}):`, error);
                return { name: token.name || 'Unknown', symbol: 'N/A', price: null };
            }
        }

        // Update V1 token list display
        async function updateV1TokenList() {
            const tokenList = document.getElementById('v1TokenList');
            
            // Only show loading state if the list is empty
            if (tokenList.children.length === 0) {
                tokenList.innerHTML = '<li></li>';
            }

            if (!plsPrice) {
                const price = await fetchPlsPrice();
                if (!price) {
                    tokenList.innerHTML = '<li style="color: #ff6666;" class="token-row">Price data temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.</li>';
                    return;
                }
            }

            // Don't clear the list if it's already populated
            if (tokenList.children.length === 0) {
                tokenList.innerHTML = '';
            }
            
            const placeholderLogo = 'https://via.placeholder.com/40?text=LOGO';

            for (let i = 0; i < v1Tokens.length; i++) {
                const token = v1Tokens[i];
                
                // Check if token row already exists
                const existingRow = document.querySelector(`[data-token-address="${token.address.toLowerCase()}"]`);
                if (existingRow) {
                    continue; // Skip if token is already displayed

                        copyIcon.title = 'Copy token address';
                        
                        const tooltip = document.createElement('span');
                        tooltip.className = 'copy-tooltip';
                        tooltip.textContent = 'Copy address';
                        copyIcon.appendChild(tooltip);
                        
                        copyIcon.onclick = (e) => {
                            e.stopPropagation();
                            navigator.clipboard.writeText(token.address).then(() => {
                                const originalContent = copyIcon.innerHTML;
                                copyIcon.innerHTML = `
                                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#00ff00" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                                        <polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>
                                    </svg>
                                `;
                                setTimeout(() => {
                                    copyIcon.innerHTML = originalContent;
                                }, 2000);
                            });
                        };
                        
                        nameSpan.appendChild(copyIcon);
                        symbolSpan.textContent = tokenData.symbol ? `(${tokenData.symbol})` : '(N/A)';
                    }
                    if (tokenData && tokenData.price) {
                        priceSpan.textContent = `$${tokenData.price} (USD)`;
                        priceSpan.style.color = '#96ffc8';
                    } else {
                        priceSpan.textContent = 'Price: Unavailable';
                        priceSpan.style.color = '#808080';
                    }

                    // Profitability calculation
                    try {
                        // Get parent token address using Parent function from V3MinterABI2
                        const v3MinterContract = new ethers.Contract(token.address, V3Minterabi2, rpcProvider);
                        v3MinterContract.Parent().then(async parentAddress => {
                            if (parentAddress && parentAddress !== ethers.constants.AddressZero) {
                                // Get parent token's LP pair address
                                const parentLpAddress = await getPairAddress(parentAddress);
                                
                                if (parentLpAddress) {
                                    // Get parent token data with LP address
                                    const parentData = await fetchTokenData({ 
                                        address: parentAddress, 
                                        name: 'Parent Token',
                                        lpAddress: parentLpAddress 
                                    });
                                    
                                    if (tokenData.price && parentData.price) {
                                        const childPrice = parseFloat(tokenData.price);
                                        const parentPrice = parseFloat(parentData.price);
                                        
                                        // Get the multiplier for V3 tokens
                                        const multiplier = await v3MinterContract.Multiplier(1);
                                        const multiplierValue = parseFloat(multiplier);
                                        
                                        // Calculate profitability considering the multiplier
                                        const profitMultiplier = (childPrice / (parentPrice * multiplierValue));
                                        const isProfitable = childPrice > (parentPrice * multiplierValue);
                                        profitabilityDiv.textContent = isProfitable 
                                            ? `${profitMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x Mint for profit` 
                                            : `${(1/profitMultiplier).toFixed(2)}x until parity`;
                                        profitabilityDiv.className = 'token-profitability ' + (isProfitable ? 'profitable' : 'not-profitable');
                                    } else {
                                        profitabilityDiv.textContent = 'No LP Pair Found';
                                        profitabilityDiv.className = 'token-profitability not-profitable';
                                    }
                                } else {
                                    profitabilityDiv.textContent = 'No LP Pair Found';
                                    profitabilityDiv.className = 'token-profitability not-profitable';
                                }
                            } else {
                                profitabilityDiv.textContent = 'Parent not found';
                                profitabilityDiv.className = 'token-profitability not-profitable';
                            }
                        }).catch(error => {
                            console.error('Error getting parent address:', error);
                            profitabilityDiv.textContent = 'Parent token not found';
                            profitabilityDiv.className = 'token-profitability not-profitable';
                        });
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error('Error calculating profitability:', error);
                        profitabilityDiv.textContent = 'Error calculating';
                        profitabilityDiv.className = 'token-profitability not-profitable';
                    }

                    // Enable mint button if price is available
                    if (tokenData && tokenData.price) {
                        mintButton.disabled = false;
                    }
                    mintButton.onclick = () => {
                        if (!connectedWalletAddress) {
                            alert('Please connect your wallet first.');
                            return;
                        }
                        currentMintToken = token;
                        currentMinterType = 'V3';
                        toggleMintPopup();
                    };
                });
            }
            
            // Setup mobile copy handlers after tokens are loaded
            setupMobileCopyHandlers();
        }

                const token = tokens[i];
                
                // Check if token row already exists
                const existingRow = document.querySelector(`[data-token-address="${token.address.toLowerCase()}"]`);
                if (existingRow) {
                    continue; // Skip if token is already displayed
                }

                const li = document.createElement('li');
                li.className = 'token-row';
                li.setAttribute('data-token-address', token.address.toLowerCase());

                // Token Logo
                const logoDiv = document.createElement('div');
                logoDiv.className = 'token-logo';
                // We'll fill this in after fetching tokenData

                // Token Info
                const infoDiv = document.createElement('div');
                infoDiv.className = 'token-info';

                const nameSpan = document.createElement('span');
                nameSpan.className = 'name';
                nameSpan.textContent = 'Loading...';

                const symbolSpan = document.createElement('span');
                symbolSpan.className = 'symbol';
                symbolSpan.textContent = '';

                const priceSpan = document.createElement('span');
                priceSpan.className = 'price';
                priceSpan.textContent = '';

                infoDiv.appendChild(nameSpan);
                infoDiv.appendChild(symbolSpan);
                infoDiv.appendChild(priceSpan);

                // Profitability
                const profitabilityDiv = document.createElement('div');
                profitabilityDiv.className = 'token-profitability';
                profitabilityDiv.textContent = 'Loading...';

                // Actions
                const actionsDiv = document.createElement('div');
                actionsDiv.className = 'token-actions';
                
                // Fast Mint Button
                const fastMintButton = document.createElement('button');
                fastMintButton.className = 'fast-mint-button';
                fastMintButton.textContent = 'Fast Mint';
                fastMintButton.disabled = false;
                fastMintButton.onclick = () => {
                    if (!connectedWalletAddress) {
                        alert('Please connect your wallet first.');
                        return;
                    }
                    currentMintToken = token;
                    currentMinterType = 'V4';
                    toggleFastMintPopup();
                };
                actionsDiv.appendChild(fastMintButton);
                
                // Regular Mint Button
                const mintButton = document.createElement('button');
                mintButton.className = 'mint-button';
                mintButton.textContent = 'Mint';
                mintButton.disabled = false; // Always enable the mint button
                mintButton.onclick = () => {
                    if (!connectedWalletAddress) {
                        alert('Please connect your wallet first.');
                        return;
                    }
                    currentMintToken = token;
                    currentMinterType = 'V4';
                    toggleMintPopup();
                };
                actionsDiv.appendChild(mintButton);

                // Assemble row
                li.appendChild(logoDiv);
                li.appendChild(infoDiv);
                li.appendChild(profitabilityDiv);
                li.appendChild(actionsDiv);
                tokenList.appendChild(li);

                // Fetch token data asynchronously
                fetchTokenData(token).then(tokenData => {
                    // Update logo
                    logoDiv.innerHTML = '';
                    
                    // Check if token has a custom logo
                    if (token.logo) {
                        const img = document.createElement('img');
                        img.src = token.logo;
                        img.alt = 'Token Logo';
                        img.style.width = '40px';
                        img.style.height = '40px';
                        img.style.borderRadius = '50%';
                        img.style.objectFit = 'cover';
                        logoDiv.appendChild(img);
                    } else if (tokenData && tokenData.symbol && tokenData.symbol !== 'N/A') {
                        const symbolFallback = document.createElement('div');
                        symbolFallback.className = 'symbol-fallback';
                        symbolFallback.textContent = tokenData.symbol.charAt(0).toUpperCase();
                        logoDiv.appendChild(symbolFallback);
                    } else {
                        const img = document.createElement('img');
                        img.src = placeholderLogo;
                        img.alt = `${tokenData?.name || 'Unknown'} logo`;
                        logoDiv.appendChild(img);
                    }

                    // Update info
                    nameSpan.textContent = tokenData && tokenData.name ? tokenData.name : 'Unknown';
                    
                    // Add copy icon
                    const copyIcon = document.createElement('span');
                    copyIcon.className = 'copy-icon';
                    copyIcon.innerHTML = '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"></rect><path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"></path></svg>';
                    copyIcon.title = 'Copy token address';
                    
                    const tooltip = document.createElement('span');
                    tooltip.className = 'copy-tooltip';
                    tooltip.textContent = 'Copy address';
                    copyIcon.appendChild(tooltip);
                    
                    copyIcon.onclick = (e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        navigator.clipboard.writeText(token.address).then(() => {
                            const originalContent = copyIcon.innerHTML;
                            copyIcon.innerHTML = `
                                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#00ff00" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                                    <polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>
                                </svg>
                            `;
                            setTimeout(() => {
                                copyIcon.innerHTML = originalContent;
                            }, 2000);
                        });
                    };
                    
                    nameSpan.appendChild(copyIcon);
                    symbolSpan.textContent = tokenData && tokenData.symbol ? `(${tokenData.symbol})` : '(N/A)';
                    if (tokenData && tokenData.price) {
                        priceSpan.textContent = `$${tokenData.price} (USD)`;
                    } else {
                        priceSpan.textContent = 'Price: Unavailable';
                        priceSpan.style.color = '#808080';
                    }

                    // Update profitability
                    try {
                        // Get parent token address using Parent function from V4MinterABI2
                        const v4MinterContract = new ethers.Contract(token.address, V4MinterABI2, rpcProvider);
                        v4MinterContract.Parent().then(async parentAddress => {
                            if (parentAddress && parentAddress !== ethers.constants.AddressZero) {
                                // Get parent token's LP pair address
                                const parentLpAddress = await getPairAddress(parentAddress);
                                
                                if (parentLpAddress) {
                                    // Get parent token data with LP address
                                    const parentData = await fetchTokenData({ 
                                        address: parentAddress, 
                                        name: 'Parent Token',
                                        lpAddress: parentLpAddress 
                                    });
                                    
                                    if (tokenData.price && parentData.price) {
                                        const childPrice = parseFloat(tokenData.price);
                                        const parentPrice = parseFloat(parentData.price);
                                        
                                        // Get the multiplier for V4 tokens
                                        const multiplier = await v4MinterContract.Multiplier(1);
                                        const multiplierValue = parseFloat(multiplier);
                                        
                                        // Calculate profitability considering the multiplier
                                        const profitMultiplier = (childPrice / (parentPrice * multiplierValue));
                                        const isProfitable = childPrice > (parentPrice * multiplierValue);
                                        profitabilityDiv.textContent = isProfitable 
                                            ? `${profitMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x Mint for profit` 
                                            : `${(1/profitMultiplier).toFixed(2)}x until parity`;
                                        profitabilityDiv.className = 'token-profitability ' + (isProfitable ? 'profitable' : 'not-profitable');
                                    } else {
                                        profitabilityDiv.textContent = 'No LP Pair Found';
                                        profitabilityDiv.className = 'token-profitability not-profitable';
                                    }
                                } else {
                                    profitabilityDiv.textContent = 'No LP Pair Found';
                                    profitabilityDiv.className = 'token-profitability not-profitable';
                                }
                            } else {
                                profitabilityDiv.textContent = 'Parent not found';
                                profitabilityDiv.className = 'token-profitability not-profitable';
                            }
                        }).catch(error => {
                            console.error('Error getting parent address:', error);
                            profitabilityDiv.textContent = 'Parent token not found';
                            profitabilityDiv.className = 'token-profitability not-profitable';
                        });
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error('Error calculating profitability:', error);
                        profitabilityDiv.textContent = 'Error calculating';
                        profitabilityDiv.className = 'token-profitability not-profitable';
                    }

                    // Enable mint button if price is available
                    if (tokenData && tokenData.price) {
                        mintButton.disabled = false;
                    }
                    mintButton.onclick = () => {
                        if (!connectedWalletAddress) {
                            alert('Please connect your wallet first.');
                            return;
                        }
                        currentMintToken = token;
                        currentMinterType = 'V4';
                        toggleMintPopup();
                    };
                });
            }
            
            // Setup mobile copy handlers after tokens are loaded
            setupMobileCopyHandlers();
        }

        // Tab selection logic
        async function selectTab(tabId) {
            if (isUpdatingTokenList) {
                console.log(`Token list update in progress, waiting for tab switch...`);
                await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100));
                return selectTab(tabId); // Retry after delay
            }

            // Clear token data cache (but keep metadata cache for performance)
            tokenDataCache = {};
            // Note: tokenMetadataCache is intentionally NOT cleared for performance

            document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(tab => {
                tab.classList.remove('active');
            });
            document.getElementById(tabId).classList.add('active');

            // Update mobile dropdown to match selected tab
            const dropdownTextElement = document.getElementById('systemTokensDropdownText');
            const dropdownItems = document.querySelectorAll('.system-tokens-dropdown-item');
            
            if (dropdownTextElement && dropdownItems.length > 0) {
                // Remove active class from all dropdown items
                dropdownItems.forEach(item => item.classList.remove('active'));
                
                // Update dropdown text and active state based on selected tab
                let dropdownText = '';
                switch(tabId) {
                    case 'tab-v1':
                        dropdownText = 'V1 - Tbill minter';
                        dropdownItems[0].classList.add('active');
                        break;
                    case 'tab-v2':
                        dropdownText = 'V2 - FDIC to BAR';
                        dropdownItems[1].classList.add('active');
                        break;
                    case 'tab-v3':
                        dropdownText = 'V3 - Index';
                        dropdownItems[2].classList.add('active');
                        break;
                    case 'tab-v4':
                        dropdownText = 'V4 - Personal';
                        dropdownItems[3].classList.add('active');
                        break;
                }
                dropdownTextElement.textContent = dropdownText;
            }

            const tokenListV1 = document.getElementById('tokenListV1');

            // Clear all token lists
            v1TokenList.innerHTML = '';

            try {

                    document.getElementById('barChildSelector').classList.toggle('active', currentTokenType === 'barChild');
                    const tokensToDisplay = currentTokenType === 'fdicBar' ? v2Tokens : BarChildTokens;

                    document.getElementById('poppytoNiSelector').classList.toggle('active', currentV3TokenType === 'poppytoNi');
                    document.getElementById('metistoUSBSelector').classList.toggle('active', currentV3TokenType === 'metistoUSB');
                    document.getElementById('usbTreeSelector').classList.toggle('active', currentV3TokenType === 'usbTree');
                    document.getElementById('metisTreeSelector').classList.toggle('active', currentV3TokenType === 'metisTree');
                    document.getElementById('paradeTreeSelector').classList.toggle('active', currentV3TokenType === 'paradeTree');
                    document.getElementById('poorTreeSelector').classList.toggle('active', currentV3TokenType === 'poorTree');

        // Mobile copy functionality for V1-V4 tokens
        function setupMobileCopyHandlers() {
            // Add click handlers for symbol elements on mobile
            const symbolElements = document.querySelectorAll('#tokenListV1 .token-info .symbol, #tokenListV2 .token-info .symbol, #tokenListV3 .token-info .symbol, #tokenListV4 .token-info .symbol');
            
            symbolElements.forEach(symbolElement => {
                // Remove existing click handler to prevent duplicates
                symbolElement.removeEventListener('click', handleMobileSymbolClick);
                // Add new click handler
                symbolElement.addEventListener('click', handleMobileSymbolClick);
            });
        }

        function handleMobileSymbolClick(event) {
            // Only handle clicks on mobile (480px and below)
            if (window.innerWidth > 480) {
                return;
            }
            
            const tokenRow = event.target.closest('.token-row');
            if (!tokenRow) return;
            
            const tokenAddress = tokenRow.getAttribute('data-token-address');
            if (!tokenAddress) return;
            
            // Copy the address
            navigator.clipboard.writeText(tokenAddress).then(() => {
                // Show visual feedback
                const originalContent = event.target.innerHTML;
                event.target.innerHTML = originalContent + ' ✓';
                event.target.style.color = '#00ff00';
                
                setTimeout(() => {
                    event.target.innerHTML = originalContent;
                    event.target.style.color = '';
                }, 2000);
                
                // Show notification
                showNotification('Address copied to clipboard!');
            }).catch(err => {
                console.error('Failed to copy: ', err);
                showNotification('Failed to copy address');
            });
        }

        // Mint popup logic
        function toggleMintPopup() {
            const popup = document.getElementById('mintPopup');
            const mintAmountInput = document.getElementById('mintAmount');
            const mintStatus = document.getElementById('mintStatus');
            const parentAddressDisplay = document.getElementById('parentAddressDisplay');
            const parentTokenEquivalent = document.getElementById('parentTokenEquivalent');
            const parentAddressText = document.getElementById('parentAddressText');
            
            popup.classList.toggle('active');
            if (!popup.classList.contains('active')) {
                mintAmountInput.value = '';
                mintStatus.textContent = '';
                parentAddressDisplay.style.display = 'none';
                parentTokenEquivalent.textContent = '';
                parentAddressText.textContent = '';
                currentMintToken = null;
                currentMinterType = null;
            } else if (currentMintToken && (currentMinterType === 'V3' || currentMinterType === 'V4')) {
                // Show parent address display for V3 and V4 tokens
                parentAddressDisplay.style.display = 'block';
                // Get parent address
                const contract = new ethers.Contract(
                    currentMintToken.address,
                    currentMinterType === 'V3' ? V3Minterabi2 : V4MinterABI2,
                    rpcProvider
                );
                contract.Parent().then(parentAddress => {
                    if (parentAddress && parentAddress !== ethers.constants.AddressZero) {
                        parentAddressText.textContent = parentAddress;
                    } else {
                        parentAddressDisplay.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                }).catch(error => {
                    console.error('Error getting parent address:', error);
                    parentAddressDisplay.style.display = 'none';
                });
            }
        }

        // Function to copy parent address
        function copyParentAddress() {
            const parentAddressText = document.getElementById('parentAddressText');
            if (parentAddressText && parentAddressText.textContent) {
                navigator.clipboard.writeText(parentAddressText.textContent).then(() => {
                    // Show a temporary success message
                    const notification = document.createElement('div');
                    notification.className = 'notification';
                    notification.textContent = 'Parent address copied to clipboard!';
                    document.body.appendChild(notification);
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        notification.classList.add('show');
                    }, 100);
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        notification.classList.remove('show');
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            notification.remove();
                        }, 300);
                    }, 2000);
                });
            }
        }

        async function confirmMint() {
            if (!window.ethereum) {
                alert('No Ethereum wallet detected. Please install MetaMask or another wallet.');
                return;
            }

            if (!currentMintToken || !currentMinterType) {
                alert('No token or minter type selected for minting.');
                return;
            }

            const mintAmountInput = document.getElementById('mintAmount');
            const mintStatus = document.getElementById('mintStatus');
            const amount = mintAmountInput.value;

            if (!amount || amount <= 0) {
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Please enter a valid amount.';
                return;
            }

            try {
                const provider = new ethers.providers.Web3Provider(window.ethereum);
                const signer = provider.getSigner();
                const userAddress = await signer.getAddress();

                // Convert amount to wei (assuming 18 decimals)
                const amountWei = ethers.utils.parseUnits(amount.toString(), 18);

                if (currentMinterType === 'V1') {
                    // V1 Minter Logic
                    mintStatus.textContent = 'Checking allowance...';
                    const tbillContract = new ethers.Contract(tbillToken.address, tbillABI, provider);
                    const currentAllowance = await tbillContract.allowance(userAddress, currentMintToken.address);
                    const sufficientAllowance = currentAllowance.gte(amountWei);

                    if (!sufficientAllowance) {
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Initiating approval for infinite allowance...';
                        const tbillContractWithSigner = new ethers.Contract(tbillToken.address, tbillABI, signer);
                        const approveTx = await tbillContractWithSigner.approve(currentMintToken.address, ethers.constants.MaxUint256);
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for approval confirmation...';
                        await approveTx.wait();
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Approval confirmed! Initiating mint...';
                    } else {
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Sufficient allowance detected. Initiating mint...';
                    }

                    const v1MinterContract = new ethers.Contract(currentMintToken.address, v1MinterMintABI, signer);
                    const mintTx = await v1MinterContract.mint(amountWei);
                    mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for mint confirmation...';
                    await mintTx.wait();
                    mintStatus.textContent = 'Mint successful!';
                    
                    // Show notification for V1 mint
                    const tokenData = await fetchTokenData(currentMintToken);
                    const tokenName = tokenData.name || 'Unknown Token';
                    const notification = document.createElement('div');
                    notification.className = 'notification';
                    notification.textContent = `Successfully minted ${amount} ${tokenName}`;
                    document.body.appendChild(notification);
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        notification.classList.add('show');
                    }, 100);
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        notification.classList.remove('show');
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            notification.remove();
                        }, 300);
                    }, 3000);
                } else if (currentMinterType === 'V2') {
                    // V2 Minter Logic
                    try {
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Preparing to mint...';
                        
                        // Get the token's position in the V2 list (1-13)
                        const v2TokenIndex = currentMintToken.index || 1; // Default to 1 if not specified
                        const sweepFunctionName = `sweep${v2TokenIndex}`;
                        
                        // Create the sweeper contract instance
                        const sweeperContract = new ethers.Contract(SweeperAddress, SweeperABI, signer);
                        
                        // Debug logging
                        console.log('Debug Info:', {
                            tokenIndex: v2TokenIndex,
                            sweepFunctionName,
                            claimTokenAddress,
                            amountWei: amountWei.toString(),
                            sweeperAddress: SweeperAddress,
                            currentMintToken: currentMintToken
                        });
                        
                        try {
                            // First approve the parent token
                            mintStatus.textContent = 'Initiating approval for parent token...';
                            const parentTokenContractWithSigner = new ethers.Contract(currentMintToken.parent.address, [
                                "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                                "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
                            ], signer);
                            const approveParentTx = await parentTokenContractWithSigner.approve(SweeperAddress, ethers.constants.MaxUint256);
                            mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for parent token approval confirmation...';
                            await approveParentTx.wait();
                            mintStatus.textContent = 'Parent token approval confirmed!';

                            // Then approve the claim token
                            mintStatus.textContent = 'Initiating approval for claim token...';
                            const claimTokenContractWithSigner = new ethers.Contract(claimTokenAddress, [
                                "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                                "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
                            ], signer);
                            const approveClaimTx = await claimTokenContractWithSigner.approve(SweeperAddress, ethers.constants.MaxUint256);
                            mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for claim token approval confirmation...';
                            await approveClaimTx.wait();
                            mintStatus.textContent = 'Claim token approval confirmed!';

                            // Call the appropriate sweep function with claim token address
                            console.log('Calling sweep function:', sweepFunctionName);
                            const mintTx = await sweeperContract[sweepFunctionName](claimTokenAddress, amountWei, {
                                gasLimit: 500000 // Add explicit gas limit
                            });
                            mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for mint confirmation...';
                            await mintTx.wait();
                            mintStatus.textContent = 'Mint successful!';
                            
                            // Show notification for V2 mint
                            const tokenData = await fetchTokenData(currentMintToken);
                            const tokenName = tokenData.name || 'Unknown Token';
                            const notification = document.createElement('div');
                            notification.className = 'notification';
                            notification.textContent = `Successfully minted ${amount} ${tokenName}`;
                            document.body.appendChild(notification);
                            setTimeout(() => {
                                notification.classList.add('show');
                            }, 100);
                            setTimeout(() => {
                                notification.classList.remove('show');
                                setTimeout(() => {
                                    notification.remove();
                                }, 300);
                            }, 3000);
                        } catch (mintError) {
                            console.error('Mint error:', mintError);
                            mintStatus.textContent = `Error during mint: ${mintError.message}`;
                            return;
                        }
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error('Error during V2 minting:', error);
                        mintStatus.textContent = `Error: ${error.message || 'Transaction failed'}`;
                        return;
                    }
                } else if (currentMinterType === 'V3') {
                    // V3 Minter Logic
                    mintStatus.textContent = 'Looking up parent token...';
                    
                    // Get the parent token address using the Parent function from V3MinterABI2
                    const v3MinterContract = new ethers.Contract(currentMintToken.address, V3Minterabi2, provider);
                    const parentAddress = await v3MinterContract.Parent();
                    
                    if (!parentAddress || parentAddress === ethers.constants.AddressZero) {
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Error: Could not find parent token address.';
                        return;
                    }

                    mintStatus.textContent = 'Checking allowance...';
                    const parentContract = new ethers.Contract(parentAddress, [
                        "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                        "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
                    ], provider);
                    const currentAllowance = await parentContract.allowance(userAddress, currentMintToken.address);
                    const sufficientAllowance = currentAllowance.gte(amountWei);

                    if (!sufficientAllowance) {
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Initiating approval for infinite allowance...';
                        const parentContractWithSigner = new ethers.Contract(parentAddress, [
                            "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                            "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
                        ], signer);
                        const approveTx = await parentContractWithSigner.approve(currentMintToken.address, ethers.constants.MaxUint256);
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for approval confirmation...';
                        await approveTx.wait();
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Approval confirmed! Initiating mint...';
                    } else {
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Sufficient allowance detected. Initiating mint...';
                    }

                    // Use the correct mint ABI for V3 tokens
                    const v3MinterContractForMint = new ethers.Contract(currentMintToken.address, [
                        {
                            "name": "mint",
                            "type": "function",
                            "inputs": [
                                {
                                    "name": "amount",
                                    "type": "uint256",
                                    "internalType": "uint256"
                                }
                            ],
                            "outputs": [
                                {
                                    "name": "",
                                    "type": "bool",
                                    "internalType": "bool"
                                }
                            ],
                            "selector": "0xa0712d68",
                            "signature": "mint(uint256)",
                            "stateMutability": "nonpayable"
                        }
                    ], signer);
                    const mintTx = await v3MinterContractForMint.mint(amountWei);
                    mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for mint confirmation...';
                    await mintTx.wait();
                    mintStatus.textContent = 'Mint successful!';
                    
                    // Show notification for V3 mint
                    const tokenData = await fetchTokenData(currentMintToken);
                    const tokenName = tokenData.name || 'Unknown Token';
                    const notification = document.createElement('div');
                    notification.className = 'notification';
                    notification.textContent = `Successfully minted ${amount} ${tokenName}`;
                    document.body.appendChild(notification);
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        notification.classList.add('show');
                    }, 100);
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        notification.classList.remove('show');
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            notification.remove();
                        }, 300);
                    }, 3000);
                } else if (currentMinterType === 'V4') {
                    // V4 Minter Logic
                    mintStatus.textContent = 'Looking up parent token...';
                    
                    let parentAddress;
                    let isV4MinterABI2 = false;
                    
                    try {
                        // First try GetStandardTokenParent
                        const v4MinterContract = new ethers.Contract(V4_MINTER_ADDRESS, V4MinterABI, provider);
                        parentAddress = await v4MinterContract.GetStandardTokenParent(currentMintToken.address);
                        
                        // If parent not found or zero address, try Parent function
                        if (!parentAddress || parentAddress === ethers.constants.AddressZero) {
                            const v4MinterContract2 = new ethers.Contract(currentMintToken.address, V4MinterABI2, rpcProvider);
                            parentAddress = await v4MinterContract2.Parent();
                            isV4MinterABI2 = true;
                        }
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error('Error getting parent for V4 token:', error);
                        // If first method fails, try Parent function
                        try {
                            const v4MinterContract2 = new ethers.Contract(currentMintToken.address, V4MinterABI2, rpcProvider);
                            parentAddress = await v4MinterContract2.Parent();
                            isV4MinterABI2 = true;
                        } catch (error2) {
                            console.error('Error getting parent using Parent function:', error2);
                            mintStatus.textContent = 'Error: Could not find parent token address.';
                            return;
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if (!parentAddress || parentAddress === ethers.constants.AddressZero) {
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Error: Could not find parent token address.';
                        return;
                    }

                    mintStatus.textContent = 'Checking allowance...';
                    // Use standard ERC20 ABI for the parent token
                    const parentContract = new ethers.Contract(parentAddress, [
                        "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                        "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
                    ], provider);
                    const currentAllowance = await parentContract.allowance(userAddress, currentMintToken.address);
                    const sufficientAllowance = currentAllowance.gte(amountWei);

                    if (!sufficientAllowance) {
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Initiating approval for infinite allowance...';
                        const parentContractWithSigner = new ethers.Contract(parentAddress, [
                            "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                            "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
                        ], signer);
                        const approveTx = await parentContractWithSigner.approve(currentMintToken.address, ethers.constants.MaxUint256);
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for approval confirmation...';
                        await approveTx.wait();
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Approval confirmed! Initiating mint...';
                    } else {
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Sufficient allowance detected. Initiating mint...';
                    }

                    // Use different mint functions based on which ABI was used to get the parent
                    if (isV4MinterABI2) {
                        // Use V4MinterABI2 which has the correct Mint() function
                        const v4MinterContractForMint = new ethers.Contract(currentMintToken.address, V4MinterABI2, signer);
                        const mintTx = await v4MinterContractForMint.mint(amountWei);
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for mint confirmation...';
                        await mintTx.wait();
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Mint successful!';
                        
                        // Show notification for V4 mint
                        const tokenData = await fetchTokenData(currentMintToken);
                        const tokenName = tokenData.name || 'Unknown Token';
                        const notification = document.createElement('div');
                        notification.className = 'notification';
                        notification.textContent = `Successfully minted ${amount} ${tokenName}`;
                        document.body.appendChild(notification);
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            notification.classList.add('show');
                        }, 100);
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            notification.classList.remove('show');
                            setTimeout(() => {
                                notification.remove();
                            }, 300);
                        }, 3000);
                    } else {
                        // Use standard mint function with amount
                        const v4MinterContractForMint = new ethers.Contract(currentMintToken.address, [
                            {
                                "name": "mint",
                                "type": "function",
                                "inputs": [
                                    {
                                        "name": "amount",
                                        "type": "uint256",
                                        "internalType": "uint256"
                                    }
                                ],
                                "outputs": [],
                                "stateMutability": "nonpayable"
                            }
                        ], signer);
                        const mintTx = await v4MinterContractForMint.mint(amountWei);
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for mint confirmation...';
                        await mintTx.wait();
                        mintStatus.textContent = 'Mint successful!';
                        
                        // Show notification for V4 mint
                        const tokenData = await fetchTokenData(currentMintToken);
                        const tokenName = tokenData.name || 'Unknown Token';
                        const notification = document.createElement('div');
                        notification.className = 'notification';
                        notification.textContent = `Successfully minted ${amount} ${tokenName}`;
                        document.body.appendChild(notification);
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            notification.classList.add('show');
                        }, 100);
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            notification.classList.remove('show');
                            setTimeout(() => {
                                notification.remove();
                            }, 300);
                        }, 3000);
                    }
                }

                toggleMintPopup();
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error during minting:', error);
                mintStatus.textContent = `Error: ${error.message || 'Transaction failed'}`;
            }
        }
