        async function connectWallet(walletType) {
    if (!window.ethereum) {
        alert('No Ethereum wallet detected. Please install MetaMask or another wallet.');
        return;
    }
    try {
        // First check current chain ID and switch to PulseChain if needed
        const currentChainId = await window.ethereum.request({ method: 'eth_chainId' });
        const pulseChainId = '0x171'; // 369 in hexadecimal
        
        // If not on PulseChain, try to switch to it
        if (currentChainId !== pulseChainId) {
            try {
                // Try to switch to PulseChain
                await window.ethereum.request({
                    method: 'wallet_switchEthereumChain',
                    params: [{ chainId: pulseChainId }],
                });
            } catch (switchError) {
                // If chain hasn't been added to wallet, add it first
                if (switchError.code === 4902) {
                    try {
                        await window.ethereum.request({
                            method: 'wallet_addEthereumChain',
                            params: [
                                {
                                    chainId: pulseChainId,
                                    chainName: 'PulseChain',
                                    nativeCurrency: {
                                        name: 'Pulse',
                                        symbol: 'PLS',
                                        decimals: 18
                                    },
                                    rpcUrls: ['https://rpc.pulsechain.com'],
                                    blockExplorerUrls: ['https://scan.pulsechain.com']
                                }
                            ],
                        });
                    } catch (addError) {
                        console.error('Error adding PulseChain network:', addError);
                        alert('Failed to add PulseChain network. Please add it manually in your wallet.');
                    }
                } else {
                    console.error('Error switching to PulseChain:', switchError);
                    alert('Failed to switch to PulseChain network. Please switch manually in your wallet.');
                }
            }
        }

        const provider = new ethers.providers.Web3Provider(window.ethereum);
        await provider.send('eth_requestAccounts', []);
        const signer = provider.getSigner();
        const address = await signer.getAddress();
        connectedWalletAddress = address;
        
        const connectButton = document.getElementById('connectWalletButton');
        // Create shorter address format for mobile
        const shortAddressNormal = `${address.slice(0, 6)}...${address.slice(-4)}`;
        const shortAddressMobile = `${address.slice(0, 4)}...${address.slice(-2)}`;
        const shortAddress = window.innerWidth <= 500 ? shortAddressMobile : shortAddressNormal;
        
        // Update button to show address
        if (window.innerWidth <= 500) {
            connectButton.textContent = shortAddress;
        } else {
            connectButton.textContent = `Connected: ${shortAddress}`;
        }
        
        // Store address as a data attribute for responsive design
        connectButton.setAttribute('data-address', shortAddress);
        connectButton.classList.add('connected');
        
        document.getElementById('walletDropdown').classList.remove('active');
        console.log(`Connected to ${walletType} at address: ${address}`);

        // Load regular tokens from localStorage
        
        console.log(`Loaded ${importedChildTokens.length} tokens for ${address}:`, importedChildTokens);
        
        // Handle Firebase authentication and spine token loading
        if (window.auth && window.db) {
    try {
        // Check if user is already authenticated for this wallet
        const isAlreadyAuthenticated = await checkExistingAuthentication(connectedWalletAddress);
        
        if (isAlreadyAuthenticated) {
            console.log('User already authenticated, loading spine tokens and imported tokens...');
            await loadSpineTokensOnConnect();
            await loadImportedTokensOnConnect(address); // Add this line
        } else {
            console.log('User not authenticated, attempting authentication...');
            const authSuccess = await authenticateWithWallet(connectedWalletAddress);
            if (authSuccess) {
                console.log('Firebase authentication successful, loading spine tokens and imported tokens...');
                await loadSpineTokensOnConnect();
                await loadImportedTokensOnConnect(address); // Add this line
            } else {
                console.warn('Firebase authentication failed, loading tokens from local storage only');
                await loadSpineTokensFromLocalStorageOnly();
                // Load imported tokens from local storage only
                importedChildTokens = loadTokensFromStorage(address);
                console.log(`Loaded ${importedChildTokens.length} imported tokens from local storage only`);
            }
        }
    } catch (authError) {
        console.error('Error during Firebase authentication:', authError);
        await loadSpineTokensFromLocalStorageOnly();
        // Load imported tokens from local storage only
        importedChildTokens = loadTokensFromStorage(address);
        console.log(`Loaded ${importedChildTokens.length} imported tokens from local storage only`);
    }
} else {
    console.warn('Firebase not initialized, loading tokens from local storage only');
    await loadSpineTokensFromLocalStorageOnly();
    // Load imported tokens from local storage only
    importedChildTokens = loadTokensFromStorage(address);
    console.log(`Loaded ${importedChildTokens.length} imported tokens from local storage only`);
}
        
        // Refresh token popup if it's open
        if (document.getElementById('tokenPopup').classList.contains('active')) {
            toggleTokenPopup();
            toggleTokenPopup();
        }

        // Refresh community display now that wallet is connected
        if (connectedWalletAddress) {
            loadCommunitySpines();
        }

        // Initialize voting contract after wallet connection
        if (typeof reinitializeVotingContract === 'function') {
            setTimeout(() => {
                reinitializeVotingContract();
            }, 1000);
        }

    } catch (error) {
        console.error(`Error connecting to ${walletType}:`, error);
        alert(`Failed to connect to ${walletType}. Please try again.`);
    }
}

async function loadImportedTokensOnConnect(address) {
    if (!address) return;

    try {
        // First load from local storage
        importedChildTokens = loadTokensFromStorage(address);
        console.log(`Loaded ${importedChildTokens.length} tokens from local storage for ${address}`);

        // Then try to load from Firebase if available
        if (window.db) {
            try {
                const firebaseTokens = await loadImportedTokensFromFirebase(address);
                
                if (firebaseTokens.length > 0) {
                    // Merge Firebase tokens with local tokens, avoiding duplicates
                    firebaseTokens.forEach(fbToken => {
                        // Validate fbToken has required properties
                        if (!fbToken || typeof fbToken !== 'object' || !fbToken.address || typeof fbToken.address !== 'string') {
                            console.warn('Invalid token data from Firebase:', fbToken);
                            return;
                        }
                        
                        const exists = importedChildTokens.some(localToken => 
                            localToken && localToken.address && 
                            localToken.address.toLowerCase() === fbToken.address.toLowerCase()
                        );
                        if (!exists) {
                            importedChildTokens.push(fbToken);
                        }
                    });
                    
                    // Save merged tokens back to local storage
                    saveTokensToStorage(address, importedChildTokens);
                    console.log(`Loaded and merged ${firebaseTokens.length} tokens from Firebase`);
                }
            } catch (firebaseError) {
                console.warn('Firebase not available, using local storage only:', firebaseError);
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error loading imported tokens:', error);
        importedChildTokens = [];
    }
}

// Add this function to check if user is already authenticated
async function checkExistingAuthentication(walletAddress) {
    if (!window.auth || !walletAddress) {
        return false;
    }

    try {
        // Check if there's a current user
        const currentUser = window.auth.currentUser;
        if (!currentUser) {
            console.log('No current Firebase user');
            return false;
        }

        // Check if the current user's wallet matches
        const storedWallet = localStorage.getItem(`firebase_auth_wallet_${currentUser.uid}`);
        if (storedWallet && storedWallet.toLowerCase() === walletAddress.toLowerCase()) {
            console.log('Found existing authentication for wallet:', walletAddress);
            return true;
        }

        console.log('Current user wallet does not match connected wallet');
        return false;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error checking existing authentication:', error);
        return false;
    }
}

        let selectedCreateMinter = null;

        function selectCreateMinter(minter) {
            selectedCreateMinter = minter;
            document.getElementById('createMinterButton').textContent = minter;
            document.getElementById('createMinterDropdown').classList.remove('active');
            
            const v3Inputs = document.getElementById('v3Inputs');
            const otherMinterMessage = document.getElementById('otherMinterMessage');
            const parentAddressInput = document.getElementById('parentAddress');
            
            if (minter === 'V1') {
                v3Inputs.style.display = 'block';
                otherMinterMessage.style.display = 'none';
                parentAddressInput.style.display = 'none';
            } else if (minter === 'V2' || minter === 'V3' || minter === 'V4') {
                v3Inputs.style.display = 'block';
                otherMinterMessage.style.display = 'none';
                parentAddressInput.style.display = 'block';
            } else {
                v3Inputs.style.display = 'none';
                otherMinterMessage.style.display = 'block';
                parentAddressInput.style.display = 'none';
            }
        }

        async function createToken() {
            if (!window.ethereum) {
                alert('No Ethereum wallet detected. Please install MetaMask or another wallet.');
                return;
            }

            if (!connectedWalletAddress) {
                alert('Please connect your wallet first.');
                return;
            }

            if (!['V1', 'V2', 'V3', 'V4'].includes(selectedCreateMinter)) {
                alert('Please select a valid minter to create a token.');
                return;
            }

            const tokenName = document.getElementById('tokenName').value;
            const tokenSymbol = document.getElementById('tokenSymbol').value;
            const initialMint = document.getElementById('initialMint').value;
            const parentAddress = document.getElementById('parentAddress').value;
            const createStatus = document.getElementById('createStatus');

            // Input validation
            if (!tokenName || !tokenSymbol || !initialMint) {
                createStatus.textContent = 'Please fill in all required fields.';
                return;
            }

            if (isNaN(initialMint) || parseFloat(initialMint) <= 0) {
                createStatus.textContent = 'Initial mint amount must be a positive number.';
                return;
            }

            // Validate parentAddress for V2, V3, and V4
            if (selectedCreateMinter !== 'V1') {
                if (!parentAddress) {
                    createStatus.textContent = 'Please enter a parent token address.';
                    return;
                }

                const isValidAddress = /^0x[a-fA-F0-9]{40}$/.test(parentAddress);
                if (!isValidAddress) {
                    createStatus.textContent = 'Invalid parent token address. Must be a 0x-prefixed 40-character hexadecimal address.';
                    console.log(`Invalid parentAddress: ${parentAddress}`);
                    return;
                }

                try {
                    const checksummedParentAddress = ethers.utils.getAddress(parentAddress);
                    console.log(`Checksummed parentAddress: ${checksummedParentAddress}`);
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error('Parent address validation error:', error);
                    createStatus.textContent = 'Invalid parent token address. Please ensure it is a valid PulseChain address.';
                    return;
                }
            }

            try {
                const provider = new ethers.providers.Web3Provider(window.ethereum);
                const signer = provider.getSigner();
                const userAddress = await signer.getAddress();

                // Convert initialMint to wei (assuming 18 decimals for MV token)
                const initialMintWei = ethers.utils.parseUnits(initialMint.toString(), 18);

                // Select the appropriate minter address and ABI
                let minterAddress, minterABI;
                if (selectedCreateMinter === 'V1') {
                    minterAddress = V1_MINTER_ADDRESS;
                    minterABI = v1MinterABI;
                } else if (selectedCreateMinter === 'V2') {
                    minterAddress = V2_MINTER_ADDRESS;
                    minterABI = v2FederalMinterABI;
                } else if (selectedCreateMinter === 'V3') {
                    minterAddress = INDEX_MINTER_ADDRESS;
                    minterABI = indexMinterABI;
                } else if (selectedCreateMinter === 'V4') {
                    minterAddress = V4_MINTER_ADDRESS;
                    minterABI = V4MinterABI;
                }

                // Check MV token allowance
                createStatus.textContent = 'Checking MV token allowance...';
                const mvContract = new ethers.Contract(MV_TOKEN_ADDRESS, mvTokenABI, provider);
                const currentAllowance = await mvContract.allowance(userAddress, minterAddress);
                const sufficientAllowance = currentAllowance.gte(initialMintWei);

                if (!sufficientAllowance) {
                    createStatus.textContent = 'Initiating approval for MV tokens...';
                    const mvContractWithSigner = new ethers.Contract(MV_TOKEN_ADDRESS, mvTokenABI, signer);
                    const approveTx = await mvContractWithSigner.approve(minterAddress, ethers.constants.MaxUint256);
                    createStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for approval confirmation...';
                    await approveTx.wait();
                    createStatus.textContent = 'Approval confirmed! Initiating token creation...';
                } else {
                    createStatus.textContent = 'Sufficient MV token allowance detected. Initiating token creation...';
                }

                // Call New function on the selected minter
                const minterContract = new ethers.Contract(minterAddress, minterABI, signer);
                createStatus.textContent = 'Initiating token creation...';
                
                let tx;
                if (selectedCreateMinter === 'V1') {
                    tx = await minterContract.New(tokenName, tokenSymbol, initialMintWei);
                } else {
                    tx = await minterContract.New(tokenName, tokenSymbol, initialMintWei, parentAddress);
                }
                
                createStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for transaction confirmation...';

                const receipt = await tx.wait();
                createStatus.textContent = 'Token created successfully!';

                // Reset form and close create token popup
                document.getElementById('tokenName').value = '';
                document.getElementById('tokenSymbol').value = '';
                document.getElementById('initialMint').value = '';
                document.getElementById('parentAddress').value = '';
                toggleCreateTokenPopup();

                // Refresh token popup if open
                if (document.getElementById('tokenPopup').classList.contains('active')) {
                    toggleTokenPopup();
                    toggleTokenPopup();
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error creating token:', error);
                createStatus.textContent = `Error: ${error.message || 'Transaction failed'}`;
            }
        }

            

        async function removeSpineColumn(tokenAddress) {
    // Stop infinite mint if running
    if (infiniteMintIntervals[tokenAddress]) {
        clearInterval(infiniteMintIntervals[tokenAddress]);
        delete infiniteMintIntervals[tokenAddress];
    }

    const column = document.querySelector(`.spine-column[data-token-address="${tokenAddress.toLowerCase()}"]`);
    if (column) {
        // Remove from UI
        column.remove();
        updateAddButtonPosition();

        // Remove from local storage
        if (connectedWalletAddress) {
            let spineTokens = loadSpineTokensFromStorage(connectedWalletAddress) || [];
            spineTokens = spineTokens.filter(t => t.address.toLowerCase() !== tokenAddress.toLowerCase());
            saveSpineTokensToStorage(connectedWalletAddress, spineTokens);

            // Remove from Firebase
            const firebaseDeleted = await deleteSpineTokenFromFirebase(connectedWalletAddress, tokenAddress);
            if (!firebaseDeleted) {
                console.warn('Failed to delete from Firebase, but deleted locally');
            }
        }

        // Show notification
        showNotification('Token removed from spine and database');
    }
}

        async function toggleInfiniteMint(tokenAddress) {
    const button = document.querySelector(`.spine-column[data-token-address="${tokenAddress.toLowerCase()}"] .UsrInfiniteMintButton`);
    const statusDot = button.querySelector('.status-dot');
    const isRunning = button.getAttribute('data-running') === 'true';

    if (isRunning) {
        // Stop infinite mint
        button.setAttribute('data-running', 'false');
        statusDot.classList.remove('active');
        button.style.background = '#96ffc8';
    } else {
        // Start infinite mint
        button.setAttribute('data-running', 'true');
        statusDot.classList.add('active');
        button.style.background = '#ff6b6b';

        try {
            // Get token parent data
            const provider = new ethers.providers.Web3Provider(window.ethereum);
            
            // Try to get parent token using V4 method first
            let parentAddress;
            try {
                const v4MinterContract = new ethers.Contract(V4_MINTER_ADDRESS, V4MinterABI, provider);
                parentAddress = await v4MinterContract.GetStandardTokenParent(tokenAddress);
            } catch (error) {
                console.warn('Could not get parent using V4 method, trying alternative', error);
                try {
                    // Try using a direct Parent() call
                    const tokenContract = new ethers.Contract(tokenAddress, [
                        { "inputs": [], "name": "Parent", "outputs": [{ "internalType": "address", "name": "", "type": "address" }], "stateMutability": "view", "type": "function" }
                    ], provider);
                    parentAddress = await tokenContract.Parent();
                } catch (error2) {
                    console.error('Could not determine parent token', error2);
                    parentAddress = ethers.constants.AddressZero;
                }
            }
            
            // Store current token info for the mint process
            currentMintToken = {
                address: tokenAddress,
                parent: { 
                    address: parentAddress !== ethers.constants.AddressZero ? parentAddress : tokenAddress 
                }
            };
            
            // Find the h2 element within the popup to update the title
            const mintPopup = document.getElementById('mintPopupV2');
            const titleElement = mintPopup.querySelector('h2');
            if (titleElement) {
                titleElement.textContent = "User Infinite Mint";
            }
            
            // Update the confirm button onclick handler
            const confirmButton = document.getElementById('confirmMintButtonV2');
            if (confirmButton) {
                confirmButton.setAttribute('onclick', 'confirmUsrMint()');
            }
            
            // Show the popup
            toggleMintPopupV2();
            
            // Add listener to reset button when popup closes
            const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
                const popup = document.getElementById('mintPopupV2');
                if (!popup.classList.contains('active')) {
                    // Reset the button state
                    button.setAttribute('data-running', 'false');
                    statusDot.classList.remove('active');
                    button.style.background = '#96ffc8';
                    
                    // Reset the popup title and button handler
                    if (titleElement) {
                        titleElement.textContent = "Mint Tokens";
                    }
                    if (confirmButton) {
                        confirmButton.setAttribute('onclick', 'confirmMintV2()');
                    }
                    
                    observer.disconnect();
                }
            });
            
            // Start observing the popup for class changes
            observer.observe(mintPopup, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class'] });
            
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('Error showing mint popup:', error);
            button.setAttribute('data-running', 'false');
            statusDot.classList.remove('active');
            button.style.background = '#96ffc8';
            
            // Show error notification
            const notification = document.createElement('div');
            notification.className = 'notification';
            notification.textContent = 'Failed to open mint popup: ' + (error.message || 'Unknown error');
            notification.style.color = '#ff6b6b';
            document.body.appendChild(notification);
            setTimeout(() => {
                notification.classList.add('show');
            }, 100);
            setTimeout(() => {
                notification.classList.remove('show');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    notification.remove();
                }, 300);
            }, 3000);
        }
    }
}

async function confirmUsrMint() {
    const mintStatus = document.getElementById('mintStatusV2');
    const amount = document.getElementById('mintAmountV2').value;
    const claimTokenAddress = document.getElementById('claimTokenAddress').value;

    if (!amount || amount <= 0) {
        mintStatus.textContent = 'Please enter a valid amount.';
        return;
    }

    try {
        const provider = new ethers.providers.Web3Provider(window.ethereum);
        const signer = provider.getSigner();
        const userAddress = await signer.getAddress();

        // Convert amount to wei (assuming 18 decimals)
        const amountWei = ethers.utils.parseUnits(amount.toString(), 18);

        // Get the child token address and parent token address
        const childTokenAddress = currentMintToken.address;
        const parentTokenAddress = currentMintToken.parent.address;

        // Check if claim address is blank - if so, do regular mint
        if (!claimTokenAddress || claimTokenAddress.trim() === '') {
            mintStatus.textContent = 'No claim address provided. Performing regular mint...';
            
            // Check parent token allowance first
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Checking parent token allowance...';
            const parentTokenContract = new ethers.Contract(parentTokenAddress, [
                "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
            ], provider);
            
            const currentAllowance = await parentTokenContract.allowance(userAddress, childTokenAddress);
            const sufficientAllowance = currentAllowance.gte(amountWei);

            if (!sufficientAllowance) {
                // If not enough allowance, proceed with approval
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Initiating approval for parent token...';
                const parentTokenContractWithSigner = new ethers.Contract(parentTokenAddress, [
                    "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                    "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
                ], signer);
                const approveParentTx = await parentTokenContractWithSigner.approve(childTokenAddress, ethers.constants.MaxUint256);
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for parent token approval confirmation...';
                await approveParentTx.wait();
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Parent token approval confirmed!';
            } else {
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Sufficient parent token allowance detected.';
            }

            // Proceed with regular minting using V2MinterABI
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Initiating regular mint...';
            const childTokenContract = new ethers.Contract(childTokenAddress, v2MinterABI, signer);
            
            // Call the mint function with the amount
            const mintTx = await childTokenContract.mint(amountWei, {
                gasLimit: 500000
            });
            
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for mint confirmation...';
            await mintTx.wait();
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Regular mint successful!';
        } else {
            // Validate the claim token address
            if (!ethers.utils.isAddress(claimTokenAddress)) {
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Invalid claim token address. Please enter a valid Ethereum address.';
                return;
            }

            // Check parent token allowance first
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Checking parent token allowance...';
            const parentTokenContract = new ethers.Contract(parentTokenAddress, [
                "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
            ], provider);
            
            const currentAllowance = await parentTokenContract.allowance(userAddress, UserSweeprAddress);
            const sufficientAllowance = currentAllowance.gte(amountWei);

            if (!sufficientAllowance) {
                // If not enough allowance, proceed with approval
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Initiating approval for parent token...';
                const parentTokenContractWithSigner = new ethers.Contract(parentTokenAddress, [
                    "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                    "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
                ], signer);
                const approveParentTx = await parentTokenContractWithSigner.approve(UserSweeprAddress, ethers.constants.MaxUint256);
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for parent token approval confirmation...';
                await approveParentTx.wait();
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Parent token approval confirmed!';
            } else {
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Sufficient parent token allowance detected.';
            }

            // Now check claim token allowance
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Checking claim token allowance...';
            const claimTokenContract = new ethers.Contract(claimTokenAddress, [
                "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
            ], provider);
            
            const claimTokenAllowance = await claimTokenContract.allowance(userAddress, UserSweeprAddress);
            const sufficientClaimAllowance = claimTokenAllowance.gte(amountWei);

            if (!sufficientClaimAllowance) {
                // If not enough allowance, proceed with approval
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Initiating approval for claim token...';
                const claimTokenContractWithSigner = new ethers.Contract(claimTokenAddress, [
                    "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                    "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
                ], signer);
                const approveClaimTx = await claimTokenContractWithSigner.approve(UserSweeprAddress, ethers.constants.MaxUint256);
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for claim token approval confirmation...';
                await approveClaimTx.wait();
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Claim token approval confirmed!';
            } else {
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Sufficient claim token allowance detected.';
            }

            // Proceed with minting using UserSweeper
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Initiating mint with UserSweeper...';
            const userSweeperContract = new ethers.Contract(UserSweeprAddress, UserSweeperABI, signer);
            
            // Call the sweep function with the required parameters
            const mintTx = await userSweeperContract.sweep(
                parentTokenAddress,  // Parent token
                childTokenAddress,   // Child token
                claimTokenAddress,   // Claim token
                amountWei,           // Amount to mint
                {
                    gasLimit: 500000
                }
            );
            
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for mint confirmation...';
            await mintTx.wait();
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Mint successful!';
        }
        
        // Get token names for notification
        let childTokenName = "tokens";
        try {
            const childTokenContract = new ethers.Contract(childTokenAddress, [
                { "inputs": [], "name": "symbol", "outputs": [{ "internalType": "string", "name": "", "type": "string" }], "stateMutability": "view", "type": "function" }
            ], provider);
            childTokenName = await childTokenContract.symbol();
        } catch (error) {
            console.warn('Could not get child token symbol', error);
        }
        
        // Show notification for successful mint
        const notification = document.createElement('div');
        notification.className = 'notification';
        notification.textContent = `Successfully minted ${amount} ${childTokenName}`;
        document.body.appendChild(notification);
        setTimeout(() => {
            notification.classList.add('show');
        }, 100);
        setTimeout(() => {
            notification.classList.remove('show');
            setTimeout(() => {
                notification.remove();
            }, 300);
        }, 3000);

        // Reset status message after showing success
        setTimeout(() => {
            document.getElementById('mintStatusV2').textContent = '';
        }, 3000);

    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error during minting:', error);
        mintStatus.textContent = `Error: ${error.message || 'Transaction failed'}`;
    }
}

        async function importTokens() {
            if (!selectedImportMinter) {
                alert('Please select a minter type first.');
                return;
            }

            const childAddress = document.getElementById('childAddress').value;

            if (!childAddress) {
                alert('Please enter a child token address.');
                return;
            }

            try {
                // Validate child address
                const checksummedChildAddress = ethers.utils.getAddress(childAddress);
                let parentAddress;

                if (selectedImportMinter === 'V1') {
                    // For V1, parent is always TBILL
                    parentAddress = tbillToken.address;
                } else if (selectedImportMinter === 'V4') {
                    // For V4, try both methods to get parent
                    try {
                        // First try GetStandardTokenParent
                        const v4MinterContract = new ethers.Contract(V4_MINTER_ADDRESS, V4MinterABI, rpcProvider);
                        parentAddress = await v4MinterContract.GetStandardTokenParent(checksummedChildAddress);
                        
                        // If parent not found or zero address, try Parent function
                        if (!parentAddress || parentAddress === ethers.constants.AddressZero) {
                            const v4MinterContract2 = new ethers.Contract(checksummedChildAddress, V4MinterABI2, rpcProvider);
                            parentAddress = await v4MinterContract2.Parent();
                        }
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error('Error getting parent for V4 token:', error);
                        // If first method fails, try Parent function
                        try {
                            const v4MinterContract2 = new ethers.Contract(checksummedChildAddress, V4MinterABI2, rpcProvider);
                            parentAddress = await v4MinterContract2.Parent();
                        } catch (error2) {
                            console.error('Error getting parent using Parent function:', error2);
                            alert('Could not find parent token for this address. Please verify the token address.');
                            return;
                        }
                    }
                } else {
                    // For V2 and V3, use GetStandardTokenParent
                    const v4MinterContract = new ethers.Contract(V4_MINTER_ADDRESS, V4MinterABI, rpcProvider);
                    parentAddress = await v4MinterContract.GetStandardTokenParent(checksummedChildAddress);
                }
                
                if (!parentAddress || parentAddress === ethers.constants.AddressZero) {
                    alert('Could not find parent token for this address. Please verify the token address.');
                    return;
                }

                // Create token object with validated addresses
                const token = {
                    address: checksummedChildAddress,
                    parentAddress: parentAddress,
                    minterType: selectedImportMinter
                };

                // Add token to importedChildTokens
                if (addImportedToken(token)) {
                    console.log(`Imported token with minter ${selectedImportMinter}: Child (${checksummedChildAddress}), Parent (${parentAddress})`);
                    
                    // Get token name for notification
                    const tokenData = await fetchTokenData(token);
                    const tokenName = tokenData.name || 'Unknown Token';
                    
                    // Show notification
                    const notification = document.createElement('div');
                    notification.className = 'notification';
                    notification.textContent = `Successfully imported "${tokenName}"`;
                    document.body.appendChild(notification);
                    
                    // Show notification
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        notification.classList.add('show');
                    }, 100);
                    
                    // Remove notification after 3 seconds
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        notification.classList.remove('show');
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            notification.remove();
                        }, 300);
                    }, 3000);
                    
                    // Reset form
                    document.getElementById('childAddress').value = '';
                    document.getElementById('importMinterButton').textContent = 'Select Minter';
                    selectedImportMinter = null;
                    toggleImportTokenPopup();

                    // Refresh token popup if open
                    if (document.getElementById('tokenPopup').classList.contains('active')) {
                        toggleTokenPopup();
                        toggleTokenPopup();
                    }
                } else {
                    alert('This token has already been imported.');
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error importing token:', error);
                alert('Invalid token address or error fetching parent token. Please verify the address and try again.');
            }
        }

        // Add this function after toggleMintPopup()
        async function updateParentTokenEquivalent() {
            const mintAmountInput = document.getElementById('mintAmount');
            const parentTokenEquivalent = document.getElementById('parentTokenEquivalent');
            const amount = mintAmountInput.value;

            if (!amount || amount <= 0 || !currentMintToken || !currentMinterType) {
                parentTokenEquivalent.textContent = '';
                return;
            }

            if (currentMinterType === 'V3' || currentMinterType === 'V4') {
                try {
                    const contract = new ethers.Contract(
                        currentMintToken.address,
                        currentMinterType === 'V3' ? V3Minterabi2 : V4MinterABI2,
                        rpcProvider
                    );
                    const multiplier = await contract.Multiplier(1);
                    const multiplierValue = parseFloat(multiplier);
                    const parentAmount = amount * multiplierValue;
                    parentTokenEquivalent.textContent = `= ${parentAmount.toLocaleString(undefined, {minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2})} parent tokens`;
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error('Error calculating parent token equivalent:', error);
                    parentTokenEquivalent.textContent = '';
                }
            } else {

        async function confirmMintV2() {
    const mintStatus = document.getElementById('mintStatusV2');
    const amount = document.getElementById('mintAmountV2').value;
    const claimTokenAddress = document.getElementById('claimTokenAddress').value;

    if (!amount || amount <= 0) {
        mintStatus.textContent = 'Please enter a valid amount.';
        return;
    }
    
    try {
        const provider = new ethers.providers.Web3Provider(window.ethereum);
        const signer = provider.getSigner();
        const userAddress = await signer.getAddress();

        // Convert amount to wei (assuming 18 decimals)
        const amountWei = ethers.utils.parseUnits(amount.toString(), 18);

        // Get the child token address and parent token address
        const childTokenAddress = currentMintToken.child.address;
        const parentTokenAddress = currentMintToken.parent.address;

        // Check if claim address is blank - if so, do regular mint
        if (!claimTokenAddress || claimTokenAddress.trim() === '') {
            mintStatus.textContent = 'No claim address provided. Performing regular mint...';
            
            // Check parent token allowance first
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Checking parent token allowance...';
            const parentTokenContract = new ethers.Contract(parentTokenAddress, [
                "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
            ], provider);
            
            const currentAllowance = await parentTokenContract.allowance(userAddress, childTokenAddress);
            const sufficientAllowance = currentAllowance.gte(amountWei);

            if (!sufficientAllowance) {
                // If not enough allowance, proceed with approval
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Initiating approval for parent token...';
                const parentTokenContractWithSigner = new ethers.Contract(parentTokenAddress, [
                    "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                    "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
                ], signer);
                const approveParentTx = await parentTokenContractWithSigner.approve(childTokenAddress, ethers.constants.MaxUint256);
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for parent token approval confirmation...';
                await approveParentTx.wait();
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Parent token approval confirmed!';
            } else {
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Sufficient parent token allowance detected.';
            }

            // Proceed with regular minting using V2MinterABI
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Initiating regular mint...';
            const childTokenContract = new ethers.Contract(childTokenAddress, v2MinterABI, signer);
            
            // Call the mint function with the amount
            const mintTx = await childTokenContract.mint(amountWei, {
                gasLimit: 500000
            });
            
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for mint confirmation...';
            await mintTx.wait();
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Regular mint successful!';
        } else {
            // Validate the claim token address
            if (!ethers.utils.isAddress(claimTokenAddress)) {
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Invalid claim token address. Please enter a valid Ethereum address.';
                return;
            }

            // Check parent token allowance first
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Checking parent token allowance...';
            const parentTokenContract = new ethers.Contract(parentTokenAddress, [
                "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
            ], provider);
            
            const currentAllowance = await parentTokenContract.allowance(userAddress, UserSweeprAddress);
            const sufficientAllowance = currentAllowance.gte(amountWei);

            if (!sufficientAllowance) {
                // If not enough allowance, proceed with approval
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Initiating approval for parent token...';
                const parentTokenContractWithSigner = new ethers.Contract(parentTokenAddress, [
                    "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                    "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
                ], signer);
                const approveParentTx = await parentTokenContractWithSigner.approve(UserSweeprAddress, ethers.constants.MaxUint256);
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for parent token approval confirmation...';
                await approveParentTx.wait();
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Parent token approval confirmed!';
            } else {
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Sufficient parent token allowance detected.';
            }

            // Now check claim token allowance
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Checking claim token allowance...';
            const claimTokenContract = new ethers.Contract(claimTokenAddress, [
                "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
            ], provider);
            
            const claimTokenAllowance = await claimTokenContract.allowance(userAddress, UserSweeprAddress);
            const sufficientClaimAllowance = claimTokenAllowance.gte(amountWei);

            if (!sufficientClaimAllowance) {
                // If not enough allowance, proceed with approval
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Initiating approval for claim token...';
                const claimTokenContractWithSigner = new ethers.Contract(claimTokenAddress, [
                    "function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)",
                    "function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) returns (bool)"
                ], signer);
                const approveClaimTx = await claimTokenContractWithSigner.approve(UserSweeprAddress, ethers.constants.MaxUint256);
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for claim token approval confirmation...';
                await approveClaimTx.wait();
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Claim token approval confirmed!';
            } else {
                mintStatus.textContent = 'Sufficient claim token allowance detected.';
            }

            // Proceed with minting using UserSweeper
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Initiating mint with UserSweeper...';
            const userSweeperContract = new ethers.Contract(UserSweeprAddress, UserSweeperABI, signer);
            
            // Call the sweep function with the required parameters
            const mintTx = await userSweeperContract.sweep(
                parentTokenAddress,  // Parent token
                childTokenAddress,   // Child token
                claimTokenAddress,   // Claim token
                amountWei,           // Amount to mint
                {
                    gasLimit: 500000
                }
            );
            
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Waiting for mint confirmation...';
            await mintTx.wait();
            mintStatus.textContent = 'Mint successful!';
        }
        
        // Get token names for notification
        let childTokenName = "tokens";
        try {
            const childTokenContract = new ethers.Contract(childTokenAddress, [
                { "inputs": [], "name": "symbol", "outputs": [{ "internalType": "string", "name": "", "type": "string" }], "stateMutability": "view", "type": "function" }
            ], provider);
            childTokenName = await childTokenContract.symbol();
        } catch (error) {
            console.warn('Could not get child token symbol', error);
        }
        
        // Show notification for successful mint
        const notification = document.createElement('div');
        notification.className = 'notification';
        notification.textContent = `Successfully minted ${amount} ${childTokenName}`;
        document.body.appendChild(notification);
        setTimeout(() => {
            notification.classList.add('show');
        }, 100);
        setTimeout(() => {
            notification.classList.remove('show');
            setTimeout(() => {
                notification.remove();
            }, 300);
        }, 3000);

        // Close the popup after successful mint
        toggleMintPopupV2();

    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error during minting:', error);
        mintStatus.textContent = `Error: ${error.message || 'Transaction failed'}`;
    }
}

async function shareSpineToCommunity() {
    if (!connectedWalletAddress) {
        showNotification('Please connect wallet first');
        return;
    }

    const spineTokens = loadSpineTokensFromStorage(connectedWalletAddress);
    if (!spineTokens || spineTokens.length === 0) {
        showNotification('No tokens in your spine to share');
        return;
    }

    if (!window.db) {
        showNotification('Firebase not initialized yet. Please try again in a moment.');
        return;
    }

    // Authenticate user before sharing
    if (!isAuthenticated()) {
        showNotification('Authenticating with wallet...');
        const authSuccess = await authenticateWithWallet(connectedWalletAddress);
        if (!authSuccess) {
            return;
        }
    }

    try {
        const spineData = {
            walletAddress: connectedWalletAddress.toLowerCase(),
            tokens: spineTokens,
            timestamp: firebase.firestore.Timestamp.now(),
            spineId: `${connectedWalletAddress}_${Date.now()}`,
            userUid: window.auth.currentUser.uid
        };

        await window.firestoreFunctions.addDoc(
            window.firestoreFunctions.collection('community_spines'), 
            spineData
        );

        showNotification('Spine shared to community successfully!');
        loadCommunitySpines();
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error sharing spine:', error);
        showNotification('Error sharing spine to community: ' + error.message);
    }
}

// Add the showNotification function (this was missing):
function showNotification(message) {
    const notification = document.createElement('div');
    notification.className = 'notification';
    notification.textContent = message;
    notification.style.cssText = `
        position: fixed;
        top: 20px;
        right: 20px;
        background: linear-gradient(45deg, #00ff00, #96ffc8);
        color: #000000;
        padding: 15px 20px;
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
        font-weight: bold;
        z-index: 1000;
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateX(100%);
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
        box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.3);
        border: 1px solid #00ff00;
        max-width: 300px;
        word-wrap: break-word;
    `;
    
    document.body.appendChild(notification);
    
    // Show notification
    setTimeout(() => {
        notification.style.opacity = '1';
        notification.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
    }, 100);
    
    // Hide notification
    setTimeout(() => {
        notification.style.opacity = '0';
        notification.style.transform = 'translateX(100%)';
        setTimeout(() => {
            if (notification.parentNode) {
                notification.remove();
            }
        }, 300);
    }, 3000);
}

// Add the missing loadCommunitySpines function:
async function loadCommunitySpines() {
    if (!window.db) {
        console.log('Firebase not yet initialized');
        return;
    }

    try {
        const querySnapshot = await window.firestoreFunctions.collection('community_spines')
            .orderBy('timestamp', 'desc')
            .get();
        
        const spines = [];
        querySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {
            spines.push({
                id: doc.id,
                ...doc.data()
            });
        });

        console.log('Loaded community spines:', spines); // Debug log
        displayCommunitySpines(spines);
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error loading community spines:', error);
        // Try without orderBy if it fails (in case the index isn't created yet)
        try {
            const querySnapshot = await window.firestoreFunctions.collection('community_spines').get();
            const spines = [];
            querySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {
                spines.push({
                    id: doc.id,
                    ...doc.data()
                });
            });
            console.log('Loaded community spines (no orderBy):', spines);
            displayCommunitySpines(spines);
        } catch (secondError) {
            console.error('Error loading community spines (second attempt):', secondError);
        }
    }
}

async function openSpineInfiniteMint(tokenAddress, parentAddress, tokenSymbol, tokenName) {
    try {
        // Check if wallet is connected - match the plus symbol notification format
        if (!connectedWalletAddress) {
            // Create and show a notification (same as plus symbol)
            const notification = document.createElement('div');
            notification.className = 'notification';
            notification.textContent = 'Please connect wallet first';
            document.body.appendChild(notification);
            setTimeout(() => {
                notification.classList.add('show');
            }, 100);
            setTimeout(() => {
                notification.classList.remove('show');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    notification.remove();
                }, 300);
            }, 3000);
            return;
        }
        
        // Set up the current mint token info for the UserSweeper function
        // Use currentMintToken directly (not window.currentMintToken) to match how it's accessed in confirmUsrMint
        currentMintToken = {
            address: tokenAddress,
            symbol: tokenSymbol,
            name: tokenName,
            parent: { 
                address: parentAddress
            }
        };
        
        // Find the h2 element within the popup to update the title
        const mintPopup = document.getElementById('mintPopupV2');
        const titleElement = mintPopup.querySelector('h2');
        if (titleElement) {
            titleElement.textContent = `Infinite Mint ${tokenSymbol}`;
        }
        
        // Update the confirm button onclick handler to use the UserSweeper function
        const confirmButton = document.getElementById('confirmMintButtonV2');
        if (confirmButton) {
            confirmButton.setAttribute('onclick', 'confirmUsrMint()');
        }
        
        // Show the popup
        toggleMintPopupV2();
        
        // Add listener to reset button when popup closes
        const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
            const popup = document.getElementById('mintPopupV2');
            if (!popup.classList.contains('active')) {
                // Reset the popup title and button handler
                if (titleElement) {
                    titleElement.textContent = "Infinite Mint Tokens";
                }
                if (confirmButton) {
                    confirmButton.setAttribute('onclick', 'confirmMintV2()');
                }
                
                observer.disconnect();
            }
        });
        
        // Start observing the popup for class changes
        observer.observe(mintPopup, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class'] });
        
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error opening infinite mint popup for spine token:', error);
        showNotification('Failed to open infinite mint popup: ' + (error.message || 'Unknown error'));
    }
}

// Function to preload all proposal images from Firebase
async function loadProposalImagesFromFirebase() {
    if (!window.db) {
        console.log('Firebase not initialized yet, will retry...');
        setTimeout(loadProposalImagesFromFirebase, 3000);
        return;
    }

    try {
        const images = await loadAllProposalImagesFromFirebase();
        
        // Store all images in localStorage for faster access
        Object.keys(images).forEach(proposalKey => {
            if (!localStorage.getItem(proposalKey)) {
                localStorage.setItem(proposalKey, images[proposalKey]);
            }
        });
        
        console.log(`Preloaded ${Object.keys(images).length} proposal images from Firebase`);
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error preloading proposal images:', error);
    }
}

// Handle image upload
function handleIconUpload(event) {
    const file = event.target.files[0];
    if (!file) return;
    
    // Check file size (5MB limit)
    if (file.size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
        showNotification('Image size must be less than 5MB');
        return;
    }
    
    // Check file type
    if (!file.type.startsWith('image/')) {
        showNotification('Please select a valid image file');
        return;
    }
    
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = function(e) {
        uploadedImageData = e.target.result;
        console.log('Image uploaded successfully, data length:', uploadedImageData ? uploadedImageData.length : 'null');
        
        // Show preview
        const preview = document.getElementById('uploadPreview');
        const placeholder = document.getElementById('uploadPlaceholder');
        const previewImage = document.getElementById('previewImage');
        
        previewImage.src = uploadedImageData;
        placeholder.style.display = 'none';
        preview.style.display = 'block';
    };
    
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
}

async function retractTitledProposal(proposalId) {
    if (!connectedWalletAddress) {
        showNotification('Please connect your wallet first');
        return;
    }
    
    try {
        // Make sure we're using the wallet provider for the transaction
        const walletWeb3 = new window.Web3(window.ethereum);
        const walletVotingContract = new walletWeb3.eth.Contract(LogoVotingABI, LogoVotingAddres);
        
        await walletVotingContract.methods.deactivateTitledProposal(proposalId).send({
            from: connectedWalletAddress
        });
        
        showNotification('Titled proposal retracted successfully!');
        loadProposals();
        loadApprovedProposals();
        closeTitledProposalPopup();
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error retracting titled proposal:', error);
        if (error.message.includes('Only proposer can deactivate')) {
            showNotification('Only the proposer can retract this proposal');
        } else {
            showNotification('Failed to retract proposal: ' + (error.message || 'Unknown error'));
        }
    }
}

async function initializeVotingContract() {
    try {
        let web3Instance = null;
        
        // If wallet is connected, use the wallet provider for transactions
        if (connectedWalletAddress && window.ethereum) {
            const Web3 = window.Web3;
            if (Web3) {
                web3Instance = new Web3(window.ethereum);
                console.log('Using wallet provider for transactions');
            }
        }
        
        // Fallback to read-only RPC for viewing proposals
        if (!web3Instance) {
            const Web3 = window.Web3;
            if (Web3) {
                web3Instance = new Web3('https://rpc.pulsechain.com');
                console.log('Using read-only RPC provider');
            }
        }
        
        if (web3Instance) {
            // Store the web3 instance globally
            window.web3 = web3Instance;
            logoVotingContract = new web3Instance.eth.Contract(LogoVotingABI, LogoVotingAddres);
            console.log('Logo Voting contract initialized');
            return true;
        } else {
            console.log('Web3 not available');
            return false;
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error initializing voting contract:', error);
        return false;
    }
}

function switchVoteTab(tab) {
    // Update tab appearance
    document.querySelectorAll('.overlay5 .tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
    event.target.classList.add('active');
    
    // Update content visibility
    document.querySelectorAll('.vote-content').forEach(content => content.classList.remove('active'));
    document.getElementById(tab + '-content').classList.add('active');
    
    currentVoteTab = tab;
    
    // Load appropriate data
    if (tab === 'proposals') {
        loadProposals();
    } else if (tab === 'approved') {
        loadApprovedProposals();
    }
}

async function submitProposal() {
    const tokenAddress = document.getElementById('proposalTokenAddress').value.trim();
    
    if (!tokenAddress) {
        showNotification('Please enter a token address');
        return;
    }
    
    if (!window.web3.utils.isAddress(tokenAddress)) {
        showNotification('Invalid token address');
        return;
    }
    
    if (!connectedWalletAddress) {
        showNotification('Please connect your wallet first');
        return;
    }
    
    if (!uploadedImageData) {
        showNotification('Please upload a logo image');
        return;
    }
    
    console.log('uploadedImageData check:', uploadedImageData ? 'Image data exists' : 'Image data is null');
    
    // Ensure we have a contract with wallet provider for transactions
    if (!logoVotingContract || !window.ethereum) {
        await initializeVotingContract();
        if (!logoVotingContract) {
            showNotification('Unable to connect to voting contract');
            return;
        }
    }
    
    try {
        // Make sure we're using the wallet provider for the transaction
        const walletWeb3 = new window.Web3(window.ethereum);
        const walletVotingContract = new walletWeb3.eth.Contract(LogoVotingABI, LogoVotingAddres);
        
        // Store the image data in a local variable to prevent it from being reset
        const imageDataBackup = uploadedImageData;
        console.log('Created image backup, length:', imageDataBackup ? imageDataBackup.length : 'null');
        
        // Submit proposal to blockchain
        const tx = await walletVotingContract.methods.upload(tokenAddress, true).send({
            from: connectedWalletAddress
        });
        
        console.log('Blockchain transaction completed, checking image data...');
        console.log('uploadedImageData after transaction:', uploadedImageData ? 'exists' : 'null');
        console.log('imageDataBackup after transaction:', imageDataBackup ? 'exists' : 'null');
        
        // Store image data in localStorage and Firebase
        const proposalKey = `proposal_image_${tokenAddress.toLowerCase()}_${connectedWalletAddress.toLowerCase()}`;
        localStorage.setItem(proposalKey, imageDataBackup);
        
        // Save to Firebase as well
        const proposalInfo = {
            tokenAddress: tokenAddress,
            proposer: connectedWalletAddress,
            proposalId: 'pending' // Will be updated when we know the actual proposal ID
        };
        
        console.log('About to save to Firebase - using imageDataBackup:', imageDataBackup ? 'exists' : 'null');
        
        // Double-check that we still have image data
        if (!imageDataBackup) {
            showNotification('Image data was lost. Please re-upload the image and try again.');
            return;
        }
        
        const firebaseSaveResult = await saveProposalImageToFirebase(proposalKey, imageDataBackup, proposalInfo);
        console.log('Firebase save result:', firebaseSaveResult);
        
        showNotification('Proposal submitted successfully!');
        
        // Close popup and reset form
        closeProposalPopup();
        
        loadProposals();
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error submitting proposal:', error);
        if (error.message.includes('eth_sendTransaction does not exist')) {
            showNotification('Please make sure your wallet is connected and on the correct network');
        } else {
            showNotification('Error submitting proposal: ' + (error.message || 'Unknown error'));
        }
    }
}

async function loadProposals() {
    const proposalsList = document.getElementById('proposalsList');
    
    if (!logoVotingContract) {
        const initialized = await initializeVotingContract();
        if (!initialized) {
            proposalsList.innerHTML = '<div class="no-proposals">Unable to connect to blockchain. Please try again later.</div>';
            return;
        }
    }
    
    proposalsList.innerHTML = '<div class="loading">Loading proposals...</div>';
    
    try {
        const activeProposalIds = await logoVotingContract.methods.getActiveProposals().call();
        
        if (activeProposalIds.length === 0) {
            proposalsList.innerHTML = '<div class="no-proposals">No active proposals</div>';
            return;
        }
        
        let proposalsHTML = '';
        
        for (const proposalId of activeProposalIds) {
            try {
                const proposal = await logoVotingContract.methods.getProposal(proposalId).call();
                proposalsHTML += createProposalHTML(proposal, true);
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error loading proposal:', proposalId, error);
            }
        }
        
        proposalsList.innerHTML = proposalsHTML || '<div class="no-proposals">No active proposals</div>';
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error loading proposals:', error);
        proposalsList.innerHTML = '<div class="no-proposals">Error loading proposals. Please try again later.</div>';
    }
}

async function loadApprovedProposals() {
    const approvedList = document.getElementById('approvedList');
    
    if (!logoVotingContract) {
        const initialized = await initializeVotingContract();
        if (!initialized) {
            approvedList.innerHTML = '<div class="no-proposals">Unable to connect to blockchain. Please try again later.</div>';
            return;
        }
    }
    
    approvedList.innerHTML = '<div class="loading">Loading approved proposals...</div>';
    
    try {
        const approvedProposalIds = await logoVotingContract.methods.getApprovedProposals().call();
        
        if (approvedProposalIds.length === 0) {
            approvedList.innerHTML = '<div class="no-proposals">No approved proposals</div>';
            return;
        }
        
        let proposalsHTML = '';
        
        for (const proposalId of approvedProposalIds) {
            try {
                const proposal = await logoVotingContract.methods.getProposal(proposalId).call();
                proposalsHTML += createProposalHTML(proposal, false);
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error loading approved proposal:', proposalId, error);
            }
        }
        
        approvedList.innerHTML = proposalsHTML || '<div class="no-proposals">No approved proposals</div>';
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error loading approved proposals:', error);
        approvedList.innerHTML = '<div class="no-proposals">Error loading approved proposals. Please try again later.</div>';
    }
}

async function getTokenInfo(tokenAddress) {
    try {
        const tokenContract = new window.web3.eth.Contract([
            {
                "constant": true,
                "inputs": [],
                "name": "name",
                "outputs": [{"name": "", "type": "string"}],
                "type": "function"
            },
            {
                "constant": true,
                "inputs": [],
                "name": "symbol", 
                "outputs": [{"name": "", "type": "string"}],
                "type": "function"
            }
        ], tokenAddress);
        
        const [name, symbol] = await Promise.all([
            tokenContract.methods.name().call(),
            tokenContract.methods.symbol().call()
        ]);
        
        return { name, symbol };
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error fetching token info:', error);
        return { name: 'Unknown Token', symbol: 'UNK' };
    }
}

<span title="${proposer}" onclick="copyToClipboard('${proposer}')" style="cursor: pointer;">Proposer: ${shortProposer}</span>

// Proposal image Firebase functions
async function saveProposalImageToFirebase(proposalKey, imageData, proposalInfo) {
    if (!window.db) {
        console.warn('Firebase not initialized');
        return false;
    }

    console.log('Saving to Firebase - imageData exists:', imageData ? 'Yes' : 'No');
    console.log('ImageData length:', imageData ? imageData.length : 'null');

    try {
        const proposalImageData = {
            proposalKey: proposalKey,
            imageData: imageData,
            tokenAddress: proposalInfo.tokenAddress,
            proposer: proposalInfo.proposer,
            proposalId: proposalInfo.proposalId,
            timestamp: firebase.firestore.Timestamp.now()
        };

        await window.db.collection('proposal_images').doc(proposalKey).set(proposalImageData);
        console.log('Proposal image saved to Firebase successfully');
        return true;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error saving proposal image to Firebase:', error);
        return false;
    }
}

async function loadProposalImageFromFirebase(proposalKey) {
    if (!window.db) {
        console.warn('Firebase not initialized');
        return null;
    }

    try {
        const docRef = window.db.collection('proposal_images').doc(proposalKey);
        const doc = await docRef.get();
        
        if (doc.exists) {
            const data = doc.data();
            return data.imageData;
        }
        return null;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error loading proposal image from Firebase:', error);
        return null;
    }
}

async function loadAllProposalImagesFromFirebase() {
    if (!window.db) {
        console.warn('Firebase not initialized');
        return {};
    }

    try {
        const querySnapshot = await window.db.collection('proposal_images').get();
        const images = {};
        
        querySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {
            const data = doc.data();
            images[data.proposalKey] = data.imageData;
        });
        
        console.log(`Loaded ${Object.keys(images).length} proposal images from Firebase`);
        return images;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error loading all proposal images from Firebase:', error);
        return {};
    }
}

// Helper function to copy addresses to clipboard
function copyToClipboard(text) {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(() => {
        showNotification('Address copied to clipboard!');
    }).catch(err => {
        console.error('Failed to copy: ', err);
        showNotification('Failed to copy address');
    });
}

async function voteOnProposal(proposalId, vote) {
    if (!connectedWalletAddress) {
        showNotification('Please connect your wallet first');
        return;
    }
    
    // Ensure we have a contract with wallet provider for transactions
    if (!logoVotingContract || !window.ethereum) {
        await initializeVotingContract();
        if (!logoVotingContract) {
            showNotification('Unable to connect to voting contract');
            return;
        }
    }
    
    try {
        // Check if user has enough CROW tokens (25+)
        const crowTokenAddress = '0x203e366A1821570b2f84Ff5ae8B3BdeB48Dc4fa1';
        const crowContract = new window.web3.eth.Contract([
            {
                "constant": true,
                "inputs": [{"name": "_owner", "type": "address"}],
                "name": "balanceOf",
                "outputs": [{"name": "balance", "type": "uint256"}],
                "type": "function"
            }
        ], crowTokenAddress);
        
        const balance = await crowContract.methods.balanceOf(connectedWalletAddress).call();
        const balanceInCrow = window.web3.utils.fromWei(balance, 'ether');
        
        if (parseFloat(balanceInCrow) < 25) {
            showNotification('You need at least 25 CROW tokens to vote');
            return;
        }
        
        // Make sure we're using the wallet provider for the transaction
        const walletWeb3 = new window.Web3(window.ethereum);
        const walletVotingContract = new walletWeb3.eth.Contract(LogoVotingABI, LogoVotingAddres);
        
        await walletVotingContract.methods.vote(proposalId, vote).send({
            from: connectedWalletAddress
        });
        
        showNotification(`Vote ${vote ? 'Yes' : 'No'} submitted successfully!`);
        loadProposals();
        loadApprovedProposals();
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error voting:', error);
        if (error.message.includes('Already voted')) {
            showNotification('You have already voted on this proposal');
        } else if (error.message.includes('Not enough CROW')) {
            showNotification('You need at least 25 CROW tokens to vote');
        } else if (error.message.includes('eth_sendTransaction does not exist')) {
            showNotification('Please make sure your wallet is connected and on the correct network');
        } else {
            showNotification('Error voting: ' + (error.message || 'Unknown error'));
        }
    }
}

async function retractProposal(tokenAddress) {
    if (!connectedWalletAddress) {
        showNotification('Please connect your wallet first');
        return;
    }
    
    // Ensure we have a contract with wallet provider for transactions
    if (!logoVotingContract || !window.ethereum) {
        await initializeVotingContract();
        if (!logoVotingContract) {
            showNotification('Unable to connect to voting contract');
            return;
        }
    }
    
    try {
        // Make sure we're using the wallet provider for the transaction
        const walletWeb3 = new window.Web3(window.ethereum);
        const walletVotingContract = new walletWeb3.eth.Contract(LogoVotingABI, LogoVotingAddres);
        
        await walletVotingContract.methods.upload(tokenAddress, false).send({
            from: connectedWalletAddress
        });
        
        showNotification('Proposal retracted successfully!');
        loadProposals();
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error retracting proposal:', error);
        if (error.message.includes('eth_sendTransaction does not exist')) {
            showNotification('Please make sure your wallet is connected and on the correct network');
        } else {
            showNotification('Error retracting proposal: ' + (error.message || 'Unknown error'));
        }
    }
}

// Function to reinitialize voting contract when wallet connects
function reinitializeVotingContract() {
    logoVotingContract = null;
    initializeVotingContract().then(() => {
        // Reload images from Firebase when wallet connects
        loadProposalImagesFromFirebase();
        
        if (currentVoteTab === 'proposals') {
            loadProposals();
        } else if (currentVoteTab === 'approved') {
            loadApprovedProposals();
        }
    });
}
